programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ms. Knope Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Leslie and Andy visit Ben and April in Washington, leaving Leslie feeling overwhelmed.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Soda Tax
programme.desc: Leslie engages on her first mission as city councilor: passing a city wide tax on giant sodas. Chris helps Andy get in shape to prepare for his police entrance exam.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: How a Bill Becomes a Law
programme.desc: Leslie works with a fellow councilman to extend the community pool hours.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Sex Education
programme.desc: An STD outbreak amongst Pawnee seniors prompts Leslie to conduct a sex education class. Tom adjusts to life without gadgets and Ben and April meet Congressman Murray for the first time.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ben's Parents
programme.desc: After being warned about Ben's divorced parents, Leslie gets nervous as she prepares to meet them. With the help of Jean Ralphio, Tom prepares to pitch his new business to Ron.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Leslie vs. April
programme.desc: Leslie gets upset when April tries to get Lot 48 made into a dog park. Meanwhile, Tom enlists Ben's help as he tries to launch his new business venture, and Andy hones his crime scene investigation skills.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Pawnee Commons
programme.desc: Leslie makes a public appeal for park design suggestions, but becomes suspicious when the best design comes from an architect in Eagleton. Meanwhile, Tom enlists the help of the office as he sets up his 'Rent-a-Swag' business.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Diane
programme.desc: Ron, Diane and Leslie attend a wood working awards dinner after Ron receives a nomination.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Two Parties
programme.desc: Ann throws a bachelorette party for Leslie and Chris throws a game night at Ben's.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Women in Garbage
programme.desc: In order to get more women in government, Leslie and April handle a garbage route. Tom learns about basketball from Andy and Ben.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ann's Decision
programme.desc: After several unsuccessful relationships Ann makes a dramatic life decision. Ben enlists the help of Chris, Tom and Ron to choose a caterer for the wedding.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Emergency Response
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben organize a black tie gala to raise money for their park, but their plans are derailed when a city wide emergency response drill is called.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Leslie and Ben
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben have only two hours to complete a year-long project. Ron gets in trouble when his temper gets the better of him.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Correspondent's Lunch
programme.desc: Leslie's planned address for a big media event is stolen, leaving her speechless. Ben starts his new job.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Bailout
programme.desc: Leslie tries to help a local video store stay in business after the owner is hit by the bad economy. Chris tries to give Tom some fatherly advice on how to deal with a difficult employee.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Partridge
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben travel back to his hometown to accept a key to the city.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Animal Control
programme.desc: Leslie decides to give the Animal Control Department a makeover. Ann tries to get Ron the medical attention he needs.

programme.title: Movie: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: A by-the-book cop must learn to step out of the box when she assigned to escort the gregarious wife of a drug boss to testify against the head of a drug cartel. As they race through Texas, the women must flee crooked cops and gunmen alike.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Offensive Fowl

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mild Bunch
programme.desc: A prank runs amok when Doug and his pal reunite at their 20th high school reunion and decide to have some fun with their old principal.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Manhattan Project
programme.desc: When an apartment becomes available in Manhattan, Carrie finally sees her dream of living in the city coming true but Doug has different plans and the two quickly realize they share a different outlook on the future.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Single Spaced
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie visit their priest for some marriage counselling, they run into friends who recently had a child, which causes both of them to think about adopting a baby.

programme.title: The King of Queens: China Syndrome
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie's marriage continues to be on the rocks when Doug learns that Carrie didn't get rid of her apartment. Both need to set aside their differences when they receive an unexpected phone call that changes their lives forever.

programme.title: Movie: Dirty Teacher
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers her teacher is seducing her boyfriend, events turn deadly after the teacher tries to cover it up.

programme.title: Movie: Lethal Seduction
programme.desc: A mother must fight to protect her son from the delusional romantic advances of an older, predatory woman who has become obsessed with him.

programme.title: Movie: Sinister Seduction
programme.desc: A recent widow is concerned for her son until he makes a new friend, but she becomes suspicious of his intentions as time goes on. As his obsession becomes more dangerous, she discovers his advances are much more sinister than she thought.

programme.title: Movie: Til Ex Do Us Part
programme.desc: After being accused of assaulting her husband's 'friend,' a woman finds herself being framed by the other, who has been engineering a series of attacks against herself in order to steal her husband.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Three women a day are killed by a former or current husband or boyfriend. Nicole Beverly is desperately trying to avoid that fate. Chris Cuomo goes inside the epidemic of intimate partner violence that turns lethal for so many women.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Doctor Love
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo unravels the twisted tale of what happened to a woman who thought she found the perfect man while online dating, until the promising love story went horribly wrong and somebody ended up dead.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Blade of Betrayal
programme.desc: When a wealthy New York woman is found brutally murdered her home, detectives learn that her family isn’t as picture perfect as they seem.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Predator or Prey?
programme.desc: Explore cases that pose hard questions about the U.S. capital punishment system.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Honey Pot
programme.desc: Hunting for a huge payday in Tyler's hometown of Sandstone, the team encounters a dangerous new method for extracting gold and Parker must decide if the risk is worth the reward.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine, Moment, Machine
programme.desc: Parker makes a gamble on dry-mining equipment to test the gold-rich ground of Western Australia. A case of gold fever proves costly, and Parker nearly loses a team member.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Hard Rock Risks
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Tyler and Parker head to a hard rock mine where they test the risk vs. reward with the help of some high explosives.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Future Ground
programme.desc: Parker travels deep into the 'Super Pit' gold mine, stakes a new claim, and makes a big decision that could change his mining career. To jump start his season, Rick Ness reunites his crew for a high-octane 500-mile ice race that ends with a big surprise.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rick's Rally
programme.desc: To save his mining future and rebuild his team, Rick Ness reunites his crew for a new mission: soup up an old UTV and compete in a 500-mile race across a frozen lake. When the guys are together, he learns that one of them won't be going back to the Yukon.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: Resurrection
programme.desc: Kellie and Henri unleash some new tech on a salt lake. A crisis may turn into a jackpot for Rick Fishers after a chance meeting.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: Resurrection
programme.desc: Kellie and Henri unleash some new tech on a salt lake. A crisis may turn into a jackpot for Rick Fishers after a chance meeting.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: The United States of Gold
programme.desc: For more than 200 years, gold has fueled the expansion of America to the west. From Arizona to Alaska, Dave Turin walks through living history and gives exclusive insight into the skills and wisdom he has learned from the old timers.

programme.title: Backyard Oil: Kentucky Fried Church
programme.desc: With a wildcat drill up for lease on Amish land, Rascal finds kinship in his bearded Amish buddy.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: St. Lawrence Team Challenge for Huge Smallmouth Bass: Hogansburg, NY, Part 2
programme.desc: David Dudley and John Cox challenge Scott and Brian Latimer to a hardcore Bass Challenge.

programme.title: Auction Kings: Rolling Stones' Snooker Table/ Aliens
programme.desc: Owner Paul Brown and Gallery 63 team prepare for their next auction, which includes the Rolling Stones' snooker table and rare African artefacts. Paul also helps out his auction business mentor (and father) Bob by selling some alien mannequins.

programme.title: Sport Fishing Television: The Dark Fight
programme.desc: Captain Sam Milazzo goes fishing for swordfish off Islamorada, Florida.

programme.title: Road Trip Masters: Road Trip Masters-Odessa, DE
programme.desc: In Delaware, the boys embark on a historical quest for gunpowder.

programme.title: Uncharted Waters with Peter Miller: Riviera Nayarite Mexico, Tuna, Cubera and Giant Amberjack
programme.desc: Peter fishes for tuna, cubera snapper, and giant amberjack at Riviera Nayarite. He also takes part in Dai De Los Muertos.

programme.title: The RVers: Leveling/ Upgrades: Mattresses
programme.desc: Learn about when to DIY and when to get help, making an RV your own, and mattresses.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Dive Dive Fish
programme.desc: Capt. Travis and 'Choppy' from Panama City Dive Center visit some prime spearfishing and dive sites.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trapped
programme.desc: An isolated road becomes a death trap when a medical emergency strikes a secluded homestead. The Raneys face their first ever failed rescue.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake on the Forty
programme.desc: The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead in utter disrepair. Beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Homestead of Horrors
programme.desc: A nightmare in North Carolina. A couple that is terrified to hunt and a ramshackle home with exposed wires in the shower and chickens in the living room. The Raneys have never seen a homestead like this.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Arizona Washout
programme.desc: In a first-ever Homestead intervention, a daughter pleads for help from the Raneys to rescue her mother and step-father whose failing homestead in Arizona sits in the crosshairs of deadly monsoon floods and a menacing cougar.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Smoky Mountain Fury
programme.desc: In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. The Raneys race to shore up key structures and establish a viable homestead business before the next big storm.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty works to overhaul the entire base of the cabin. Misty constructs a greenhouse out of scavenged windows, and Matt builds a workshop for the Oglesbys' leather goods business.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Moose Mayhem
programme.desc: To save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose and secure a source of food, Marty builds a bridge across a murky creek to access more property, Matt teaches predator deterrent techniques, and Misty builds a snow-proof greenhouse.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: 28 Foster Homes
programme.desc: Chris helps a woman locate her father after spending years being shuffled through 28 foster homes. Two radically different sisters, adopted into the same family, seek Lisa's help to find their biological mother.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: The Missing Piece
programme.desc: Chris tries to solve the fifty-year-old mystery of why a woman was abandoned at a Laundromat, days after being born. A family enlists Lisa's help to track down the first-born son that was placed for adoption, hoping to fulfill a father's dying wish.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Self-Quarantined: The New Normal
programme.desc: The couples are forced to adapt to a new normal. Pregnant Alla is quarantined separately from Matt, Emily fears Sasha may have contracted the virus and Jorge gives an update from prison.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Buggin' Out & Dumpster Diet
programme.desc: Bugs have been a part of David's diet for over 12 years including the venomous variety.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Airline Addict and Crazy for Capybaras
programme.desc: Anthony has been collecting aviation memorabilia since he was five-years-old. Melanie is crazy about her pet capybara and takes him for walks and teaches him tricks.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Star Chaser and the Little Merman
programme.desc: Eric is so obsessed with mermaids he has transformed himself into a real-life merman.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Troll Takeover & Stuffing Animals
programme.desc: The Smith family has a collection of 213 stuffed and mounted animals within their home. Michelle's obsession with trolls threatens her relationship with her family.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Spin Cycle and Newborn Dolls
programme.desc: Fred and Robert spent over 40-thousand to have a rare collection of vintage washing machines. Lynn has created over 1,800 life-like vinyl newborn dolls.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: This Little Piggy and All Dolled Up
programme.desc: Sharon collection of pig items has exceeded 6,000 pieces and adorns almost every square inch of her home. Rebecca's obsession with Barbie dolls leads her to style her own hair and wardrobe to match her dolls.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Mannequin Invasion and Carrot Queen
programme.desc: Chad Michael's collection of over 300 mannequins has taken over every room of his house. Zizi's has 35 carrot tattoos and every room in her house has a carrot theme.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Raggedy Ann and A Rat's Tale
programme.desc: Chantal's 19 pet rats are more than just pets; she considers them her children.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Mouse Mania and Wigged Out
programme.desc: Janet has spent the last 30 years collecting over 5,000 Mickey memorabilia items. Tamis has been obsessed with wearing wigs for the past 20 years and has over 2,000 wigs.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Ketchup and Mustard
programme.desc: Barry owns the world's largest mustard collection numbering 5,500 bottles from 80 countries. Ralph's rare collection of Ketchup bottles includes a patent bottle from 1891.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: The Stench Is Amazing
programme.desc: If Tim doesn't grow up and get his home cleaned before his inheritance runs out, he'll lose the house and end up out on the street. A similar fate is in store for twin brothers Lorrin and Orin if their decades-long compulsion can't be curbed.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Full of Rats
programme.desc: Property investors get more than they bargained for when the house they purchased is occupied by hoarder Michelle and a rat infestation so bad, it has compromised the building's foundation.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Losing Half Myself
programme.desc: Phyllis and Patty aren't just identical twins, they're identical twin hoarders. They've transformed every home in which they've ever lived into a complete disaster area.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: A Graveyard of Junk
programme.desc: It's the most extreme roach infestation ever seen on Hoarding: Buried Alive, and if Seymour can't conquer it and clear out the hoard in his house, the city will condemn the home and leave him homeless.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: You're Gonna Die in Here
programme.desc: Once a respected high school principal, Wayne's life changed when he was the target of a thwarted school shooting. Now paralyzed by PTSD and compulsive hoarding, Wayne has virtually barricaded himself inside his home and in turn has abandoned his family.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Don't Mess With the Nest
programme.desc: A gorger girl plans to marry her Gypsy man for the second time, but his mom is less than impressed.

programme.title: Fresh Out Live
programme.desc: Fresh Out Live delivers the most important music and pop culture news of the week and beyond with artist interviews, in-studio performances, album drops, and tour announcements.

programme.title: Movie: Titanic
programme.desc: Two social opposites meet and fall in love while on Titanic's maiden voyage.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Cody Garbrandt

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Reptile House
programme.desc: Scott buys a dilapidated house that is unexpectedly occupied by some creepy cold-blooded creatures.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Country Club House
programme.desc: Scott and his team makeover neglected homes, creating happy new homeowners and neighbours.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Ugly Coyote House
programme.desc: When Scott purchases an abandoned house on the outskirts of Vegas, his crew must fight off some very unwelcome houseguests.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Halfway Home
programme.desc: A married couple gets divorced in middle of renovating, flippers can't turn it down! The team finds a way to follow the design choices and add a new master suite to the back of the home.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Complex Duplex
programme.desc: Justin and Ashlee are ready for the challenge of flipping a home that Duke and Keith don't think is salvageable. Lacking contractors and dealing with a squatter, the pair needs Duke and Keith's help to complete this tricky home makeover.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent: Wife Killer or Self Defense
programme.desc: A man shoots his wife, and it's all caught on camera.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent: Attempted Murder or Protective Mother?
programme.desc: After years of caring for a sick child, a mother may be hiding a terrible secret. Accused of attempting to murder her son, she is now fighting for her freedom.

programme.title: Live PD
programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Trouble Shoot
programme.desc: Find out why Murr is particular about the way labels face in grocery stores, how Sal always gets Joe to break character and who works out with a personal trainer.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The C-Team
programme.desc: Station 24 is forced to work with the buff and handsome C-Team and their new transfer Delilah. Terry buys a gas-guzzling truck and Eddie takes him for a ride.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: The C-Team
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cyber Buddies
programme.desc: Find out which bit involving a scandalous photograph didn't make the cut, and which Joker got fired twice in one summer. Plus, learn which challenge took all day and night to complete.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No. Holds. Barred
programme.desc: It's getting hot and heavy as powerlifting besties battle a couple whose on and off status is ever evolving.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Fighting Back the Tears
programme.desc: Gym-loving ladies power through the pain while bartending besties try to knock back the heat. The fight for $25,000 is not easy. Friendships will strain, people will cry, and stomachs will be destroyed in the pepperdome.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Where's the Bathroom?
programme.desc: Pete Lee reveals how millennials cure glaucoma, Michelle Buteau becomes a guidance counselor, and Matthew Broussard unmasks a German techno DJ in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Russian Interference
programme.desc: Gina Yashere obsesses over the contents of a crowd member's pants, Joel Kim Booster knows exactly what not to say as a Pilates teacher, and Dave Hill tries a unique style of crowd work.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Let the Record Show
programme.desc: Adam Ray steps out of a time machine, Brad Williams almost makes his head explode in a rant about airplanes, and Sarah Tiana reveals how Brad gets a waiter's attention.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Actually Quite Wholesome
programme.desc: Find out what Yamaneika Saunders does on blind dates, what bizarre get-rich-quick schemes Julian McCullough has up his sleeve, and how Jessimae Peluso brings Yamaneika to tears from laughter.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hacking the Home and Beyond
programme.desc: Find out which outdoor chore helps Brooke keep the rage at bay, what the first tennis balls were made of and which host was a high school track star.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: The Hack Super Villain
programme.desc: Find out which scientist inspires Kevin, how many egg hacks Brooke has tested, and which hack Kevin was most excited to try.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hack the Unexpected
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin put their hacking skills to the test as they find out which hacks work best for popping popcorn and polishing silverware. Plus, they’ll uncover the best hacks for working out and using dental floss.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hack-a-bye Baby
programme.desc: Find out which cop show had an influence on hack 911, what early ice skates were made out of, which old wives' tale is actually true, and which hack Kevin and Brooke thought was a prank.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Skull With a Flower Hat
programme.desc: The trick that nearly burned Michaels face, who he gets in prank wars with on-set, and which trick did he created a prop for.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Positive Presence
programme.desc: Learn which trick Michael has been performing since he was a child, who embarked on a 21-day juice diet cleanse and what moment had everyone on set erupting with laughter.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: It's a Makeshifte
programme.desc: Find out why Michael had to get scorpion training, what animal the crew chased around a store and where Michael's favourite vacation spots are.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Might Be Trippin'
programme.desc: Find out which trick nearly wounded a delivery man, what illusion is difficult for even skilled magicians to pull off and why fans speculated the show was connected to the illuminati.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover police officer infiltrates an L.A. street gang in order to crack a hijacking ring.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Whole Lotta Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into hearty helpings of comfort starting with a soul food spot dishing out Southern seafood and killer fried chicken in Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast, West Coast
programme.desc: Guy visits a California joint to try spicy pork and knockout gnocchi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Flavortown Comes Home
programme.desc: With restaurant takeout and delivery taking over the nation, on this trip, Guy is hosting a virtual Triple-D family reunion, bringing 'Flavortown' to his own kitchen. Guy checks in with four DDD alumns who walk Guy through their signature recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Meat and Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into mega meat and a little bit of sweet. In Atlanta, a Korean-taqueria mashing up unique flavors in their chicken tacos and bulgogi fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lots of Latin
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is loading up on all kinds of Latin on this trip. In Logan, Utah, a Salvadoran spot puttin' out pupusas and a cabeza creation. A funky food truck in Denver dishing out prime-time Puerto Rican specialties. And in Burlington, Vt.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: British, Hawaiian and Mexican
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub from all around the globe! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a true British pub serving authentic English staples from fish and chips to Yorkshire pudding.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cosmopolitan Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing all kinds of cosmopolitan comfort food. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, a righteous joint puts a New England spin on corned beef and cabbage, plus a fresh take on stroganoff.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Typical Joints
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's going off the beaten path to check out some funky finds. In Charlotte, N.C., an eatery tucked inside a beer store slings crazy waffle creations. In Houston, a not-your-everyday fusion joint mashes up killer barbecue with sushi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Home Delivery
programme.desc: Guy meets virtually with four chefs who walk him through one of their dishes with ingredients they've sent him. In this episode there's primo pork from New Hampshire, California chicken parm, Minneapolis pizza and tuna all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tasty Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into dishes steeped in tasty tradition. In Seattle, a funky spot makes their name with scratch-made Russian piroshki. A tucked-away joint in Kona serves up a bite of culture with their authentic Hawaiian cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Mouthfuls
programme.desc: Guy's unhinging his jaw for some mega mouthfuls! In Robbinsville, New Jersey, a real-deal Italian market cookin' up prosciutto bread and their multi-meat 'boss of the sauce'.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Full of Surprises
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into some surprising ingredients. In Santa Fe, N.M., a culinary pub serving up lights-out lamb neck and frying up tamales. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky tapas joint dishin' out duck tongue tacos and braised pork jowl.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: On the Hook and in the Bun
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in off-the-hook seafood and digging into some serious sandwiches on this trip. In Seattle, a beer-lover's spot serving fantastic fish and chips and the bomb beef dip. On the big island of Hawaii, a local gem dishin' out fresh-catches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coming Together in Cali
programme.desc: For this trip, Guy Fieri zeroes in on Chico, California, celebrating the town's food scene as residents and restaurant owners recover from ravaging fires that rocked the area.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Home Delivery
programme.desc: Guy meets virtually with four chefs who walk him through one of their dishes with ingredients they've sent him. In this episode there's primo pork from New Hampshire, California chicken parm, Minneapolis pizza and tuna all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hitting the Grill
programme.desc: Guy samples foods straight off the grill, including a burger joint in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Passin' the Baton
programme.desc: Guy's hitting' the road and chowin' down on some long standing traditions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multitaskers
programme.desc: A Greek diner is decked out in neon and servin' up family recipes like Yia Yia's grape leaves. In Oxnard, Calif., the jack of all trades joint is baking, brewing and cooking all in the same restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Gettin' Fresh
programme.desc: In Boulder, Colo., a college town favourite since the 1920s is flipping grass-fed beef burgers. And, in Chicago, a family-run restaurant puts a twist on biscuits and gravy - with free-range duck.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sweet 'n Savory
programme.desc: Guy discovers homemade banana cream pie in Minnesota.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to Tampa Bay for authentic Mexican street food served out of a bus. In Virginia Beach, he has dinner at a popular seafood joint, and in San Antonio he visits a breakfast joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Only at This Joint
programme.desc: A BBQ place in Portland serving smoking trout and Oysters Rockefeller in Florida.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pork and Paprikash
programme.desc: Guy finds a diner spicing, roasting and smoking fresh pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Guy travels to places where things are still done the old-fashioned way. In Oklahoma City, a steak house has been serving the same menu items for more than 80 years.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Breakfast for Dinner, South of the Border
programme.desc: Rachael shows that breakfast for dinner doesn't have to mean pancakes and scrambled eggs. She whips up crave-worthy chilaquiles with a rich, red chile sauce made with Guajillo peppers for a satisfying kick.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: A Picture Worth Eating
programme.desc: Valerie invites photographer Brian Bowen Smith over for a menu inspired by his favorite ingredient, tequila. Tequila lime chicken wings, chayote slaw, chile lime party mix, a mango tart and mango tequila sunrise are served.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Kitchen Cantina
programme.desc: The Kitchen is celebrating Cinco De Mayo with a menu full of dishes inspired by Mexican drinks. Sunny Anderson cooks up Michelada Steak Tacos with Cerveza Pico, and then Jeff Mauro and Geoffrey Zakarian share two new ways to top tacos.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Spicy Kitchen
programme.desc: After chowing down on some delicious but fiery hot chicken from Prince's Hot Chicken Shack, Trisha and her friend Julie make some spicy specialties, including chipotle peanuts and South tex-mex rice.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Taco Night Twist
programme.desc: Molly Yeh treats her girlfriends to a taco night done Pizza Friday style. Her menu includes taco pizza Al Pastor with tomatillo salsa and avocado cucumber salad served alongside watermelon agua fresca.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 3
programme.desc: Ree and her family film a mix of easy quarantine recipes and fun outtakes. Ree puts a spin on pantry, fridge and freezer staples with her hash brown tostadas and fancy grilled PB&J, a mashup of two favourites.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh Boy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking for her permanently hungry teenage sons. First, she makes buffalo chicken totchos that are a blend of potato tots, nachos and wings.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quarantine Edition: Leftover Takeover
programme.desc: The Kitchen is sharing amazing ways to transform leftovers with brand-new ideas plus delicious inspiration from viewers on social media. Sunny Anderson hits the grill with leftover marinara sauce and makes easy bacon and egg breakfast pizza.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Heating Up with Jason Isbell and Amanda Shires
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is a huge fan of husband and wife singer-songwriters Jason Isbell and Amanda Shires. True to southern hospitality, Trisha invites them over for a delicious meal with an added kick.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Cheese Please
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to cook at the ranch with one request: make it with cheese, please. Aaron May makes banana and blue cheese crostadas and haloumi French fries and Aarti Sequeira creates Egyptian spinach pie.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Part 1
programme.desc: Sixteen chefs who have mastered and won Guy's Grocery Games are back to compete in an epic five-week event: The Supermarket Masters Tournament. Four amazing GGG winners kick things off by making an upscale dinner that turns into an uphill battle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Part 2
programme.desc: The Supermarket Masters Tournament continues as four more GGG winners compete for a guaranteed $10,000 and a shot at winning up to $25,000 more in the finale. First, the chefs have to serve up a plate of hometown comfort.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Part 3
programme.desc: Four more GGG winners are ready to master the store in part three of the Supermarket Masters Tournament. First, they must make a steakhouse dinner, even though the meat and seafood sections of the market are unexpectedly closed.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Part 4
programme.desc: Four past GGG winners are vying for an instant $10,000 and the last spot in the Supermarket Masters Tournament finale. First, they must make a high-end, old-school dinner that includes the mish-mash of ingredients on Guy's Grocery List.

programme.desc: From a Mississippi bridge where a murderer was hanged for his crimes to Savannah's oldest operating hotel built prior to the Civil War, these terrifying roads and haunted roadside spots will make any driver want to lock the doors and roll up the windows.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Restless Dead
programme.desc: From a former Victorian-era asylum where victims were experimented on to a remote Nebraska outpost where a scorned woman killed her unfaithful husband, we explore the gravest of locations where the dead never sleep.

programme.title: Paranormal Emergency: What If It Comes for Us
programme.desc: A police chief must save his community from an ominous entity called the Tall Man, a deputy confronts a forgotten spirit in an old prison and officers come face-to-face with an urban legend.

programme.title: Paranormal Emergency: The Devil Can Do Bad Things
programme.desc: An EMT gets a ghostly surprise after a deadly shootout, officers encounter a convict with supernatural powers and a coroner discovers the dead aren't always at rest.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: The Shady Bunch
programme.desc: GG undergoes emergency surgery and the crew rallies around her. Tommy and MJ meet with a lawyer to discuss Reza's charges against them. Reza unleashes his anger on Nema for meddling in his personal affairs.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Country Fried Persians
programme.desc: Destiney surprises Sara's brother Sam for his birthday, but has questions after seeing a completely different side to him. Nema prepares for his event while Erica finally leaves his company. The entire crew gears up for his event, and a surprise meeting.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Le’ing with the Devil
programme.desc: Mike surprises Paulina with a birthday trip to Hawaii, and invites the whole crew along. Paulina plans a night out with the girls before the trip, while Nema and Mike prepare by getting Botox. Tensions boil over among the Shahs at an unforgettable Lu'au.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Behind the Episode: The Persian Shore

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friday Night Tights

programme.title: Raven's Home: It's Not Easy Being Green
programme.desc: Booker gets jealous when Danni strikes up a friendship with Nia and Tess. Meanwhile, Levi helps Raven and Chelsea realize they should combine their businesses.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Crewed Up
programme.desc: When Levi starts hanging out with a new group of friends, Booker has a vision that leads him to believe that they're up to no good and tries to steer Levi away from them.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sorry to Father You

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Sorta Sisters-a-Rooney

programme.desc: Liv throws a sleepover to help Ruby and her co-star Priya become better friends.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Standup-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Joey is nervous when he's invited to perform stand-up comedy at a local restaurant. Parker finds himself in a predicament when he isn't sure if he's asked his fellow classmate to be his partner in a science competition or his date to a school dance.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Roll Model-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv and her fellow female co-stars of 'Sing It Louder' attempt to break the stereotype that boys are better than girls at 'boy stuff' by organizing a woodblock derby race against the boys. Maddie and Willow take part in a challenge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Gathering Storm
programme.desc: Russel Douglas was a troubled father hoping for a fresh start when he was found shot dead in his car. The investigation would turn up few clues until an anonymous tipster sent detectives on an international manhunt to unravel a mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Middle of the Night
programme.desc: After college student Angie Samota was stabbed to death, police had no shortage of suspects. A crucial clue narrowed their list to one name, but it would be years before technology and a tenacious friend came together to help unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Snapped: Geraldine Jones
programme.desc: After a young mother disappears with a woman claiming to be a social worker, an investigation into her whereabouts ends in a gruesome discovery.

programme.title: Snapped: Anne Trovato
programme.desc: A family recovering from one devastating loss is hit with another when a man finds his sister stabbed to death in her living room.

programme.title: Snapped: Kristen Westfall
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple is gunned down outside a Texas church, small town cops realize they know the victims as they uncover a murder plot fuelled by twisted family ties.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Middle of the Night
programme.desc: After college student Angie Samota was stabbed to death, police had no shortage of suspects. A crucial clue narrowed their list to one name, but it would be years before technology and a tenacious friend came together to help unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Deadly Design
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores. Police release surveillance footage to the press and ask the public for help to find a duffle bag wielding murderer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Other Zodiac
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs. Police race against time before he can achieve twelve killings to complete the Zodiac.

programme.title: Snapped: Lupita Acuna
programme.desc: The search for a missing man leads investigators to a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Snapped: Kim Parker
programme.desc: When a young Marine goes missing, police uncover his troubled marriage and a deadly plot.

programme.title: Snapped: Bernadette Perusquia
programme.desc: A school nurse pulls the trigger; was it self-defence or did she commit murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Blood Betrayal
programme.desc: A young father is found with a fatal gunshot wound. The authorities say it’s suicide but his family knows he would never take his own life. A mother and daughter fight for nearly 40 years to reveal the truth with the help of a dedicated police chief.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Two Deaths, One Suspect
programme.desc: A grieving husband claims his wife accidentally fell to her death. Investigators become suspicious after learning his first wife also died in a freak accident.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Detective
programme.desc: When a Texas police detective finds his wife dead from a gunshot wound his fellow detectives work to uncover if her death was an accident, a suicide, or something more sinister.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Blood and Justice
programme.desc: When a former cop discovers his wife shot to death, authorities believe it’s suicide. But her family fights back, turning the Texas justice system upside down.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Dying Declaration
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve Spingola head to Flint, Michigan to investigate the brazen 1991 shooting of a beloved woman murdered right outside her home. As she died in her sister's arms her final words could provide insight into who killed her.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Valentine's Day Violence
programme.desc: Kelly and Tonya investigate the 2016 murder of a young Florida mother shot to death in her own home. It'll take cutting-edge forensic technology and old-school interrogation techniques to catch her killer and bring justice to her grieving mother.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Small Town Predator
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny team up to tackle the 1988 murder of a woman whose headless body was found at a cemetery after a night at a local bar. The patrons of the bar could hold the key to identifying her killer and getting her family justice.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Mystery on the Mountain
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey investigate the 2012 disappearance of a young father who traveled to Idaho to attend a family reunion, but never showed up. As the list of suspects grows, can the team uncover the truth behind his vanishing?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Double Life Discovered
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny investigate one of their oldest cases ever, the brutal 1984 murder of an elderly storeowner known for having a wife with a violent temper. Was his death the robbery gone wrong it appeared to be, or a plot of his wife's design?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Digging for Answers
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve head to Oregon to help solve the 1993 murder of a young man allegedly shot and buried by a group of dangerous criminals. They'll need to pit them against each other to crack the case and finally bring justice to his family.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Deadly Affairs
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve investigate the 2016 homicide of a hard-working mother who was strangled to death and dumped in a ditch. Was it a random act of violence, or did her strained marriage factor in to her murder?

programme.title: Movie: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Legendary showman P.T. Barnum launches his iconic and legendary circus and museum, assembling a collection of performers, oddities, animals and outcasts to create the greatest show on Earth, succeeding despite countless doubters and setbacks.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hardly Kirk-ing

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gorgeous Grampa

programme.title: The Simpsons: Black-Eyed, Please

programme.title: The Simpsons: What Animated Women Want

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fabulous Faker Boy

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Saga of Carl Carlson

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangers on a Train
programme.desc: On a trip to 'Dizzneeland,' the Simpons board the wrong ride and are transported to Kang and Kodos' home planet.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerland

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIV
programme.desc: Homer rides around Springfield wreaking havoc as 'The Fat in The Hat' in a rhyming Dr. Seuss-ian tale. In 'Dead and Shoulders,' Bart is beheaded during a kite accident and his head is attached to Lisa's body.

programme.title: Family Guy: Married With Cancer

programme.title: Family Guy: Dead Dog Walking

programme.desc: Archer helps defend a village from party crashers intent on ruining oysterfest.

programme.title: Movie: The Godfather

programme.title: Movie: The Godfather II

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Chris Hemsworth, Phoebe Waller-Bridge, Richard E. Grant, Joe Lycett are interviewed.

programme.title: Movie: The Godfather
programme.desc: A Mafia boss's innocent bookish son gets involved in the family business after a mob hit and becomes immersed in the world of organized crime.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Best of Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Revisit the most memorable scenes from Blue Planet II's seven episodes. Highlights include giant trevally that fly out of the water to snatch seabirds in mid-air and the industrious tuskfish who uses a coral anvil to crack open his clams.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Serengeti
programme.desc: Take a peek at one of the most famous habitats on Earth the Serengeti. This vast grassland is home to some of the greatest concentrations of herbivores in Africa.

programme.title: Planet Earth: One Amazing Day
programme.desc: The sun's journey across Earth's highest mountains and its most remote jungles in a single day is revealed.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Our Blue Planet
programme.desc: Explore parts of the ocean that have never been visited, encounter extraordinary animals and discover insights into life beneath the waves. Sir David Attenborough then examines the impact of human activity.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chernobyl's Nuclear Monsters
programme.desc: Strange circles of reindeer appear in the remote tundra of Sweden, experts investigate if this mysterious event could be evidence of fatal aftershocks from the Chernobyl nuclear disaster.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Deadly Women: DIY Burial
programme.desc: Dig into the world of these Deadly Women... and in their 'DIY Burial,' you will find blood and bone.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Ditched and Desperate
programme.desc: Breaking up is never easy but it can be murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are unthinkable.

programme.title: Alone at Home
programme.desc: When the Ord family moves from Pennsylvania to Florida to start a new life, the joy is short-lived when one of them disappears.

programme.title: Alone on Campus
programme.desc: A stalker torments a college sophomore living on her own for the first time.

programme.title: Alone on the Lake
programme.desc: A mysterious drowning in a lake leads police to the trail of a potential serial killer.

programme.title: Home Alone: Behind the Shower Curtain
programme.desc: Catherine thinks that dumping her boyfriend will solve her problems, but when he breaks into her home intending to kill her, he takes her family hostage.

programme.title: Alone on Campus
programme.desc: A stalker torments a college sophomore living on her own for the first time.

programme.title: Alone on the Lake
programme.desc: A mysterious drowning in a lake leads police to the trail of a potential serial killer.

programme.title: Home Alone: Inheriting Evil
programme.desc: CeCe Coffee is a Southern Belle with a beautiful home but very little home security. In a bizarre case of mistaken identity, she falls prey to a brutal home invasion that will force her to think on her feet if she wants to stay alive.

programme.title: Alone at Home
programme.desc: When the Ord family moves from Pennsylvania to Florida to start a new life, the joy is short-lived when one of them disappears.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Shot for Teacher
programme.desc: Wisconsin carpenter Ruben Borchardt falls hard and fast for mysterious newcomer, Dianne. When they marry- just a few months after his first wife's death- Ruben finds himself on a disturbing path to the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Naval Affair
programme.desc: Fred and Jennifer have a picture perfect marriage. But when Fred meets Danielle, a young doctor in the Navy, Jennifer fights to keep Fred for herself. The love triangle explodes, leaving police struggling to understand a grisly crime scene.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: Three eight-year-old boys are murdered, mutilated and hogtied in a watery ditch in West Memphis, Arkansas. Police suspect three teenagers they believe have ties to Satanism. Soon, locals come forward with startling information.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: Satanic Panic
programme.desc: When Jessie Misskelley confesses to the murder of three young boys, he and his friends are arrested, sending West Memphis into a frenzy. The misfit teens are put on trial and their alleged satanic beliefs are at the heart of the prosecution's case.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Damien and Jason are found guilty of the triple child murder. Soon, a worldwide movement arises to prove their innocence and new evidence emerges to bolster their case.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: The Millers always thought something was off with their oldest son Steven. But as he slips from strange into sinister, there's no telling how far Steven will go to get his respected New York family's attention.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Home Invasion
programme.desc: 26-year-old Julie Curry Boyd took the steps to separate her and her children from a marriage of 13 years. A sudden threat finds Julie desperate but determined to keep her family safe.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: 19-year-old Micah Rineis striking out on her own when she falls for fellow college student Thomas Pate. But when their love takes her far away from family and friends, Micah begins to wonder who she can really trust.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Midlife Crisis
programme.desc: After a string of bad dates, Texas social worker Deborah Houchin believes she's finally found the man of her dreams. But not long after talk turns to marriage, Deborah disappears. It will take the help of her coworkers to find out what happened.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Behind the Barn
programme.desc: 20-year-old Kristy Ray is living at home and working her way through college until one day when she is shockingly abducted. Local law enforcement will need the help of the FBI and community members as they race to find Kristy before time runs out.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cooking with Fire
programme.desc: After leaving a violent ex-husband and firing a problem employee, 21-year-old Cathy Whitehead is happy to build a life with the man of her dreams. But when a stranger shows up on her doorstep one night, she's soon caught up in the web of a familiar foe.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lying for Love
programme.desc: After a rocky first marriage, Tim Koile has a new bride and a fresh lease on life. But when temptress Cathy Cousin moves next door, the married woman wraps the devoted father around her finger, and has him satisfy her every whim no matter how diabolical.

programme.title: Diabolical: Someone's Lying
programme.desc: On April 17, 2015, a Virginia hunter stumbles upon a grisly discovery in the woods: a woman with an execution style gun shot wound to the back of her head. As detectives begin their investigation, they uncover a twisted web of lies and crimes.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Deadly Phantom Coup
programme.desc: The CIA use psychological warfare in Guatemala, 1954, as part of the coup d'état which changed history. In a top-secret operation using covert radio broadcasts to create a 'phantom' army, combined with a guerilla invasion trained by a top agents.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Part of the Texas Seven
programme.desc: Patrick Murphy and six other inmates pull off the largest escape in Texas history. They launch a statewide crime spree but up the ante when they kill a police officer. They hide in an RV Park but get recognized, prompting a showdown with authorities.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Hit Homes on Halloween
programme.desc: Desperate for their next high, Michael Kidd, Kevin Crandall, and Marcus Thompson join forces on Halloween night to break into upscale homes in search of cash. But the crime spree becomes a terrifying hostage situation when they commit a home invasion.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot in the Leg
programme.desc: When a friend is fired from a restaurant, Konh Chung Bounnam and his friends decide to rob it. The plan goes awry and three people are killed. His friends are caught but Bounnam stays free. He hides until his need for money gets the FBI's attention.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to be the Black Market Maestro
programme.desc: A 19-year-old's escalating crimes get him arrested. After a jury acquits him for attempted murder, he reverts back to his old ways by robbing wealthy homeowners. The crime-spree launches a countywide manhunt.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Four different stories that of events that happened against all odds.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Courage Under Fire

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: From the ashes of the Confederacy rises a bold rebel outlaw determined to get rich and get even. Jesse James is seen by many as a modern day Robin Hood, a Southern gentleman avenging the efforts of Northern businessmen to exploit his territory.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger

programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Carnival and Bollywood
programme.desc: Buddy and Duff face off in a battle of carnival treats. They must satisfy a crowd of hungry amusement park patrons. For the cake-off challenge, they must each create a Bollywood-inspired cake for Aatari Sequeira.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: It's a Dog's Life
programme.desc: Buddy and Duff put their skills to the test making pies that are delicious and beautiful enough to wow the judges. Buddy pays homage to his Old World roots, while Duff follows his artistic impulses. They create dog-themed cakes for Christina Anstead.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: Duff Goldman brings Buddy Valastro into his world of fine dining with a challenge to create elegant plated desserts. In the cake-off, they must create a cake for celebrity event planner Slomique Hawrylo's bridal fitting event.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Donuts and Magic
programme.desc: Kicking things off in the bake-off challenge, pastry chefs Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman have to handle the morning rush at Los Angeles' iconic Randy's Donuts drive-thru. They prepare dozens of deep-fried delights.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: For the finale, pastry chefs Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman head to the Food Network Kitchen to create their most heartfelt and monumental creations yet: chocolate desserts to conceal engagement rings for two surprise proposals.

programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro dives into Hot Tamales and their addictive cinnamon snap, Nathan's irresistible chili cheese fries and finds out how Dum Dums lollipops got their name. Finally, he finds out about Annie Chun's flavor-packed Mini Wontons.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Melting Pot
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro serves up a made-in-the-USA, multicultural menu. A family-run Philadelphia factory for the secrets of an authentic Italian cannoli.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Barbecue Sides
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro puts together the perfect backyard barbecue, including Mrs. Freshley's melt-in-your-mouth cupcakes, Mrs. Fisher's perfectly-salted rippled chips, and Mayfield Dairy's creamy banana split ice cream.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Flavor Infusion
programme.desc: Alfonso has the inside information on what makes some treats so tasty, from the iconic Andes Mints to Christie's chocolate cookies. Then, see how snacks like Taffy Town's cotton candy taffy and Ole Smoky Tennessee Moonshine pack so much serious flavors.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Seafood
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels America to reel in the fifteen very best seafood dishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Grilled
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best grilled dishes in restaurants across America. He's hanging out in the kitchens of fire-loving chefs to learn everything there is to know about applying heat and smoke for the tastiest chicken, beef, and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger's in Southern California for two unbelievable backyard blowouts. Roger meets Chef Ben Ford in Tarzana.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wine Country Cookouts
programme.desc: California's wine country is the perfect place for an outdoor cookout. The weather is gorgeous, the wine is simply divine, and the food is down-right delicious. Roger has been invited to two parties: a pig roast in Paso Robles and a surf and turf grill.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Holy Smokes!
programme.desc: Roger attends the 100 year anniversary of the St. Mary Magdalene Church Picnic in Owensboro, Kentucky. Several thousand pounds of meat will cook over 100 feet of fire and smoke.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Three-Alarm Fire
programme.desc: Roger visits Faith's Farm in Bonfield, IL for an awesome feast cooked on three different fiery contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Puerto Rican Grilling
programme.desc: Roger is in Puerto Rico where the weather is hot, the view is smoking and the food is a fuego. It's his first time visiting Puerto Rico and he's inviting his friends along for the ride.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireside Hangs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is hanging out with two chefs putting a whole new spin on rotisserie cooking in the great outdoors. At SpringHouse restaurant in Alexander City, Ala., Chef Rob McDaniel has designed a fire-fueled contraption that he and Roger use to roast.

programme.title: Good Eats: Churn Baby Churn 2
programme.desc: After a visit from federal ice cream agents and investigating the ingredients, Alton cracks the code of making homemade ice cream.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics V: A Pound of Cake
programme.desc: Alton considers the pound cake to be an American classic.

programme.title: Good Eats: Let Them Eat (Icebox) Cake
programme.desc: Alton resuscitates the languishing tradition of the 'icebox' or 'refrigerator' cake. These no-bake cakes were all the rage in the 1950s, but they’re ready for a pastry redux.

programme.title: Good Eats: Devil of a Cake
programme.desc: Alton Brown reinvents the classic Devil's food cake and its cousin red velvet.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems

programme.title: Gravity Falls: A Tale of Two Stans
programme.desc: Stan decides to run for Mayor of Gravity Falls to earn the kids’ and the townsfolk respect.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
