programme.title: The Killer Truth: Blade of Betrayal
programme.desc: When a wealthy New York woman is found brutally murdered her home, detectives learn that her family isn’t as picture perfect as they seem.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Blade of Betrayal

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaska Range
programme.desc: Ana and Jacob White, leading furniture DIY-ers with thousands of social media followers, build their dream cabin in the remote Alaskan interior on Paxson Lake.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliffside retreat for a family wanting to reconnect in the Sierra Nevada Mountains. But for Gregg and his team, building in the middle of nowhere presents its challenges.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cob Cottage
programme.desc: After years of apprenticing, Sonia is putting her skills to the test by building her first house: an off-grid cob cottage on top of an Oregon mountain. Her lack of experience and the Pacific Northwest's rainy season could wash away her dreams.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Sick as a Skunk

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Beating Heart 'Bama

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Mismatch in the Mountains

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: A Romney Rebel Returns

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: After the Rain Comes the Rainbow

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An entrepreneur who sells customized Bobble Heads wants an investment from the sharks to create an extension of his already lucrative business. Plus the sharks offer four times more money than what was sought, for an innovative new business set.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An entrepreneur is brought to tears in recounting how she got to the Shark Tank debt-free. Also, during another pitch, Shark Robert Herjevec loses his cool.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fandom Pains/ Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sitting Bull/ The Spies Who Loved Me
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their babysitting club. Ronnie Anne wants to go downtown, but her grandparents think it's too dangerous.

programme.title: The Loud House: Stall Monitor/ A Pimple Plan
programme.desc: Worried that his teacher has bad things to say about him, Lincoln tries to delay his parent-teacher conference. Luan wakes up with a pimple on the day of her first date with Benny, so she turns to the siblings for help.

programme.title: The Loud House: Friended! With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne makes friends with a girl whose family wants to rent the apartment upstairs, and tries to dissuade another couple from renting in.

programme.title: The Loud House: Write and Wrong/ Purrfect Gig
programme.desc: Mom tries to convince a newspaper editor that her kids are perfect in order to land a parenting advice column job. When the McBrides go out of town, they hire Luna to catsit but the job becomes more demanding than she imagined.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mime Games
programme.desc: Bose must try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest when Danger Force and Captain man are called to Paris.

programme.title: Kids' Choice Awards 2020: Celebrate Together
programme.desc: We celebrate kids' favourites in movies, music, TV and social. With slime in space, Jojo Siwa's slime day, an Asher Angel performance and more. Plus, learn how to help the KCA's and No Kid hungry end childhood hunger.

programme.title: Young Dylan: The Enforcer
programme.desc: On his first day at school, Dylan starts a classroom protest over having to wear uniforms.

programme.title: All That: Blackbear
programme.desc: The story of DJ Salad's rise to fame, and his beef with Cardi Beef. Detective Dan and Ann investigate a missing cat, while Nathan, Gaby and Kate enjoy their new 11K TV.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Finds Out
programme.desc: Ross becomes very upset when Rachel leaves a message saying that she is over him.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Russ
programme.desc: Rachel says she's over Ross, but Russ, her new date, is a little too similar to Ross.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Lesbian Wedding
programme.desc: The gang attends the wedding of Ross's ex-wife where Monica is the caterer.

programme.title: Friends: The One After the Super Bowl
programme.desc: Ross decides to track down Marcel; Phoebe plays songs for children at the library.

programme.title: Friends: The One After the Super Bowl
programme.desc: Chandler is left in a restaurant wearing only underwear; Rachel and Monica have a fight.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Prom Video
programme.desc: Ross is determined to make Rachel see they should be together. An old video from Monica’s prom surfaces and Rachel sees how much Ross has always loved her. Joey buys Chandler a gold bracelet as a thank you gift.

programme.title: Mom: Pilot
programme.desc: A newly sober single mother is trying to get her life together. She is challenged when her estranged mother, Bonnie comes back into the picture.

programme.title: Mom: A Pee Stick and An Asian Raccoon
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie set aside their difference to deal with a family crisis together.

programme.title: Mom: Loathing and Tube Socks
programme.desc: Christy’s patience is tested by everyone she knows. Meanwhile, Bonnie runs into an old rival.

programme.title: Mom: Six Thousand Bootleg T-Shirts and a Prada Handbag
programme.desc: Christy makes a new friend who has big problems. Meanwhile, Bonnie attempts to put someone else's needs ahead of her own.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Thinks Vic's Fiancée Is Lion About Being a Cheetah
programme.desc: George seeks help from a popular reality TV game show in order to expose Vic's cheating, gold-digging fiancée.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Helps Angie's Wha-Positive Self Image
programme.desc: When Angie gets concerned about losing her looks, George asks his gorgeous young niece to tone down her sex appeal.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's Grave Mistake Sends Him to a Funeral, Holmes
programme.desc: George's poor memory comes back to haunt him when Angie's mother passes away.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Joins the Neighborhood Wha-tcha and Raises the Vigil-ante
programme.desc: George and Angie have 'the talk' with Max when a sexual predator moves in the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Full House: Smash Club: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jesse inherits the Smash Club; he wants to reopen it but must get a bank loan first.

programme.title: Full House: High Anxiety
programme.desc: Michelle wants Danny to stop treating her like a baby and Jesse can't make decisions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Getaway/ Lost and Found
programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it's the new teacher who learns a lesson. When Mr. Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost in the lost and found.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Retires/ Trident Trouble
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he's still up to no good.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fun-Sized Friends/ Grandmum's the Word
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves. Plankton tells his Grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Sky Police/ Father's Day Parade
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Believe It or Not
programme.desc: The Rangers are skeptical when Steel says he's found clues that prove Evox may have returned.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Chaperone/ Employee of the Month
programme.desc: When Mr. Krab's daughter Pearl is stood up, SpongeBob agrees to step in. Then, Mr. Krabs dupes SpongeBob into believing he might break his winning streak and lose to Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Back to the Past / The Bad Guy Club for Villains
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick travel back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. The pair enjoy a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Nitwitting/ The Ballad of Filthy Muck
programme.desc: Patrick introduces SpongeBob to his society of dullards and doofuses. /Patrick takes his grime to a new level, playing around in the trash so much that he's unrecognizable.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Old Chum/ Stormy Weather
programme.desc: The place that Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Appointment TV/ Karen's Virus
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but SpongeBob may not make it home in time to watch. Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Coupon/ Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it. Mr. Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he'll have to get the artist out of the picture.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale of a Birthday/ Karate Island
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to give his daughter the best birthday ever. SpongeBob is assigned the task of finding out what she would like; SpongeBob is invited to a karate competition on the mysterious Karate Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bummer Vacation/ Wigstruck
programme.desc: SpongeBob has never taken a vacation, so Krabs makes his #1 employee take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kick the Bucket List/ Party Down
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are jeopardized when they only have one day to complete their list. Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests don't like what she's planned.

programme.title: The Loud House: Washed Up/ Recipe for Disaster
programme.desc: The Louds end up marooned on a deserted island when they rent a boat for a trip on the lake. And, Lincoln and Clyde find a frozen food company using Dad's recipes.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Free the Highway
programme.desc: The OPP must organize recovery crews when a 70-vehicle whiteout crash shuts down Highway 400. The Sarnia team struggles to recover a trailer without losing the load.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Pull 'n Pray
programme.desc: Eric is working to find his place on the County/Coxon team when a T-bone semi collision spurs them into action. A blizzard sends Andrew on an urgent rescue mission.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: A Big Problem
programme.desc: An air ambulance takes off when a pileup results in serious casualties. A veteran operator rescues a leaning trailer.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Pool-itically Incorrect
programme.desc: Outdoor BBQ plans go up in flames, people literally find themselves on thin ice, and a sunny day at the pool isn't as relaxing as you think.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: The Most Blunder-full Time of Year
programme.desc: An inflatable reindeer gets frisky with a reporter, a couple of speedboaters go way overboard, and a jockey has an embarrassing wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Fair Weather Friends
programme.desc: People find thrills and chills at the county fair, weathercasters experience unexpected interruptions and crazy ways to beat the heat.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Just Let It Slide
programme.desc: Skidding cars perform an unexpected ice ballet, a monkey picks a reporter's nose, and a bikini girl on a zipline goes airborne.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Wild Weather Control
programme.desc: Winter that's one for the record books, a bus that tries to outrun rare Romanian tornado and a shelf cloud that is the stuff of nightmares when wild weather is unleashed.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Wild Weather Rampage
programme.desc: Duck and take cover, Mother Nature's mad and she's unleashing the very worst of weather.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Snow and Tell
programme.desc: A weathercaster has an embarrassing slip of the tongue, a kid uses the sled and string method to pull a loose tooth, and an actor creates his own wind on live TV.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: The Nutcracker Sweet
programme.desc: Weather reporters get a serious case of the giggles, and some people get really dirty…in the mud.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Wind, Lose, or Draw!
programme.desc: A paraglider doesn't know which end is up, a little girl uses some adult words when shoveling snow, and Triumph the Insult Comic Dog delivers a weather report as only he can.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: When It Rains It Pours
programme.desc: A bikini model slips on the runway, a boater slips overboard, and a weather person has an embarrassing slip of the tongue.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Casualties of War
programme.desc: With winter's first blow, new recruit John must save a snow plow stuck in an icy river. While Jamie pushes further into new territory, changes rock the company, forcing Colin to take on a new role. The community says farewell to a Heavy Rescue legend.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Saved on Preacher's Corner
programme.desc: Jamie's new B.C. crew struggles with a mangled trailer on a blind corner. When Colin slips up on a big recovery in Alberta, Jamie's brother must take over the job, even though he's a rookie on the rotator; Brandon steps up to a new role.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: War Zone
programme.desc: When a lumber truck and diesel tanker collide, the flaming wreckage is the biggest recovery of Colin's career. As snowstorms pummel the Coquihalla, Al Quiring heads up the hill. In freezing rain, John faces off against a mangled tractor.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Holidays Thru Hell
programme.desc: A semi plows off a bridge, leaving a trailer and three RVs dangling over a raging river. John must get holiday traffic moving and prove himself on a multi-part recovery unlike anything they've faced.

programme.title: Hoarders: Maggie and Ann
programme.desc: Maggie's home is so packed with her shopping addiction that her granddaughter was forced to sleep on top of piles and shower outside with a garden hose.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sandi and Vivian
programme.desc: Sandi is known as the town's Mrs. Claus over the holidays. However, she has taken her alter ego to the extreme with her gift hoarding compulsion.

programme.title: Hoarders: Constance and Jeri Jo
programme.desc: Constance is a food hoarder and her daughter will contact the authorities if she doesn't get help. Jeri Jo is married to a convicted murderer who's in jail for life, and she claims her loneliness causes her to hoard.

programme.title: Hoarders: Linda
programme.desc: Linda hadn't allowed her family into her home for years. A recent medical emergency exposed the secret she'd been hiding. What her daughter found in her home shocked her and made her question her mother's sanity.

programme.title: Movie: Ocean's Eleven
programme.desc: A gang of thieves devise a plan to rob an underground vault that services three Las Vegas casinos.

programme.title: Movie: Ocean's Thirteen
programme.desc: Danny Ocean and his team plan to bankrupt one of Vegas' most powerful businessmen after he double-crosses one of the original eleven.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cyber Buddies
programme.desc: Find out which bit involving a scandalous photograph didn't make the cut, and which Joker got fired twice in one summer. Plus, learn which challenge took all day and night to complete.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.
programme.desc: When Fire Commissioner Eddie Penisi, Sr. shows up at the station, Eddie and Terry vie for his approval. Meanwhile, the rest of the team plays Dungeons & Dragons to win the acceptance of their dungeon master.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cyber Buddies
programme.desc: Find out which bit involving a scandalous photograph didn't make the cut, and which Joker got fired twice in one summer. Plus, learn which challenge took all day and night to complete.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.
programme.desc: When Fire Commissioner Eddie Penisi, Sr. shows up at the station, Eddie and Terry vie for his approval. Meanwhile, the rest of the team plays Dungeons & Dragons to win the acceptance of their dungeon master.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the benefits of spiders, serves up knowledge on why we should be eating more bugs as a protein source, and illustrates the benefits of little bugs on your gut health.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Ken Jeong
programme.desc: Ken Jeong battles against Sean Evans and the wings of death, all while dispelling common medical myths and discussing his encounters with NB legends like Shaq and Kevin Durant.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Jeff Goldblum
programme.desc: Jeff Goldblum faces the wings of death while breaking down Jurassic Park lore and discussing his spiritual encounter with Quavo.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Halle Berry
programme.desc: Find out how Halle Berry takes spicy food as she lets her competitive spirit loose and discusses topics such as Kanye lyrics, dog training and her iconic film roles.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Chrissy Teigen
programme.desc: Chrissy Teigen licks her way through the wings of death while discussing memorable Twitter wars, the Medieval Times and a no-fail recipe for Thai ribs.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Jump the Line
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin give tips on skipping a busy lunch line, and the Pitchman has money-saving advice for your car. Plus, find out where high heels come from.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hack to the Future
programme.desc: Go to the future with Kevin as he lives out his hoverboard dream, and watch Brooke and Kevin spot a hack that helps your sheets feel like a million bucks.

programme.title: Hack My Life: To Tell a Lie
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin meet their toughest challenge yet when they use hacks to game a polygraph test, and Kevin learns how to defend himself with a smartphone.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Awww Craps
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin see if they can game the system with a high stakes dice-throwing hack, and they test some surprising hacks for sleeping through the night.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pineapple Breeze
programme.desc: Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix a tablet, makes a drink that's impossible to swallow and turns a dog into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Essence of the Wings
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Relax the Back
programme.desc: Michael shocks people with every trick in the book, including a voice controlled page turner and outfit changes that almost get him recognized. And later, Michael amazes a trainee with a weightless mattress.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 16
programme.desc: A music festival tent-surfer, beer-pong brawlers, a drunk girl in a dryer and a guy whose flaming shot goes bad.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 17
programme.desc: See 20 stellar examples of stupid celebrations, complete with fireworks in the bathtub, a drunk diving off an escalator and dinner for one on the subway floor.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 19
programme.desc: Outdoor partiers in a hurricane, a victorious coach trashing the team trophy, a barfing birthday boy and a rowdy groom who gets tazed at his own wedding.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cyber Buddies
programme.desc: Find out which bit involving a scandalous photograph didn't make the cut, and which Joker got fired twice in one summer. Plus, learn which challenge took all day and night to complete.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.
programme.desc: When Fire Commissioner Eddie Penisi, Sr. shows up at the station, Eddie and Terry vie for his approval. Meanwhile, the rest of the team plays Dungeons & Dragons to win the acceptance of their dungeon master.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: Trailer
programme.desc: Follow a business that makes arts and crafts out of Moose droppings.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover police officer infiltrates an L.A. street gang in order to crack a hijacking ring.

programme.title: Movie: Too Fast Too Furious
programme.desc: An officer, stripped of his badge, is recruited to infiltrate an illegal Miami street racing circuit in an effort to redeem himself.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Sean Boswell travels to Tokyo to live with his father in the hopes of avoiding a jail sentence. In an impoverished section of the city, he gets drawn into the world of drift racing.

programme.title: Movie: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: After Letty is killed, Dom returns to America in search of her killer. Brian is an FBI agent who is on the same trail as Dom, which leads to a drug ring and Letty's killer. Infiltrating the driver ranks, Dom and Brian try to get to the bottom things.

programme.desc: The 'Blind Auditions' continue as superstar coaches Kelly Clarkson, Nick Jonas, John Legend and Blake Shelton all vie to discover and coach the next singing phenomenon in the 'Blind Auditions.'

programme.title: The Voice: The Blind Auditions, Part 5
programme.desc: The 'Blind Auditions' continue as superstar coaches Kelly Clarkson, Nick Jonas, John Legend and Blake Shelton all vie to discover and coach the next singing phenomenon in the 'Blind Auditions.'

programme.title: The Voice: The Battles Premiere

programme.title: The Voice: The Battles Part 3
programme.desc: The 'Battle Rounds' conclude as the coaches enlist music industry powerhouse to prepare their artists to go head-to-head in the hopes of advancing to the 'Knockout Rounds.'

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover police officer infiltrates an L.A. street gang in order to crack a hijacking ring.

programme.title: Movie: Too Fast Too Furious
programme.desc: An officer, stripped of his badge, is recruited to infiltrate an illegal Miami street racing circuit in an effort to redeem himself.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Finale
programme.desc: The final four Supermarket Masters are ready to compete for the title of champion and the biggest shopping spree ever, worth up to $25,000.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Home Delivery
programme.desc: Guy meets virtually with four chefs who walk him through one of their dishes with ingredients they've sent him. In this episode there's primo pork from New Hampshire, California chicken parm, Minneapolis pizza and tuna all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Time Flavour
programme.desc: Guy's looking for plates packing a punch. He tries a unique version of pizza that involves jam as well as an oxtail stew.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unconventional Comforts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to the east coast of Oahu and visits a general store serving traditional Hawaiian dishes. In Chicago, an Italian family is serving sandwiches made from scratch, and in Hernando, an underground cafe serving French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Timeless Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy gets the lowdown on some longstanding traditions. In Philadelphia, the Jamaican joint going all out authentic with the jerk chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom's Kitchen
programme.desc: Guy hits the road to grab grub straight from mom's kitchen. In Boulder, a mother and son team serve Chinese specialties, a Jamaican joint dishes out island favourites in Columbus and a Phoenix family spot cooks Latin cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Racing Through Charlotte
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out high octane joints in Charlotte, North Carolina, with NASCAR driver Clint Bowyer. First, the relocated Triple-D alum dishin' out dynamite burgers and a unique spin on shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian Inspired
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is getting in touch with his Italian roots. First up, he pops back into an Italian market in Baltimore, where the arancini and eggplant lasagna are both off-the-hook.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pork To Pasta
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diggin' into everything from pork to pasta on this trip. In Chicago, a real-deal Italian spot with righteous ravioli and dynamite deep dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Inspiration
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to meet chefs putting their roots into their menus. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' Louisiana specialties like blackened chicken pasta and a marrow butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Sandwiches To Stroganoff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into all kinds of hearty meals on this trip. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mash-up pilin' up smoked meat sensations. Plus a funky joint making big-time empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Trifecta
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into some winner winner chicken dinners! In Maui, Hawaii, it's a star-studded stop at Mick Fleetwood's joint serving the rocker's mom's favourite chicken, plus a dish that musician Sammy Hagar dives right into.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Between the Bread
programme.desc: Guy's grabbin' grub piled high on bread and buns. In Colorado Springs, a funky joint is going scratch-made and local with their Pueblo chili burger and a hangover specialty. Then, Guy visits a family-run sandwich shop in Washington D.C.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Little Lighter
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is lightening the load on this trip, starting in Boston, where he pops into Triple D's first diner to check out the egg-white omelets. Then, a Cuban joint in Los Angeles is trading in bread for plantains and stuffing avocado with fresh fish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Dishes
programme.desc: Guy takes on unique eats. In Honolulu, a Jamaican joints serves up jerk chicken wings and goat curry. In Arlington, it's potato pancake stuffed with beef. And in Las Vegas, a taco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Matters
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's stepping into some family kitchens. In Vancouver, B.C., the Chinese joint hand-pulling noodles and using ages-old family recipes for dishes like beef rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old to New
programme.desc: Guy's in for some old school favourites and new school stunners.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tasting all kinds of international comfort classics such as the authentic British fish 'n chips joint known for keeping it real.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homegrown and Homemade
programme.desc: Guy hits a restaurant South Carolina that serves collard greens right off the farm.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Latin Street Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taste buds are dancing as he digs into all kinds of Latin favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dives Worth a Drive
programme.desc: Guy hunts down killer dives, including a nightclub in Cleveland that serves salmon BLTs.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Tex-Mex Entertaining
programme.desc: Ina Garten has all the bases covered when it comes to Tex-Mex entertaining. She makes a light and airy tres leches cake with berries and make ahead whipped cream, and her crowd-pleasing pork Posole.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Between the Bread
programme.desc: Bobby Flay creates three breakfast sandwiches inspired by some of his favorite things. He opens up with the 'Sabich,' an Israeli pita sandwich inspired by his favorite falafel shop, then creates an egg-in-a-hole benedict with roasted tomato garlic.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Party in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Giada shares her personal tips, strategies and recipes for planning parties at home.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Taco Tuesday, SoCal-Style
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli loves the idea of Taco Tuesday, with its easy prep and infinite combinations of tastes and textures. She's putting together her own taco-centric spread with plenty of toppings and side dishes for a fast and tasty weeknight meal special.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Back Office Bash
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her team are having a casual office-warming party at their new space in town. For the appetizer menu, Ree makes maple bacon dip with apples, easy Italian cheese sticks and marinara sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Tuesday Night Lights
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making a family dinner with her son Todd's favorite foods to celebrate his football team taking on their rivals. She prepares cheesesteak paninis and homemade cheese sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Moving House
programme.desc: There's a new cowboy on the ranch, and Ree Drummond is making him dinner to-go and sharing the epic story of delivering his massive, ready-built house.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 3
programme.desc: Ree and her family film a mix of easy quarantine recipes and fun outtakes. Ree puts a spin on pantry, fridge and freezer staples with her hash brown tostadas and fancy grilled PB&J, a mashup of two favourites.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Mexican Brunch
programme.desc: Molly is hosting a Mexican themed brunch for the spicy senoritas of the grand forks brunch club.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: No Siesta Fiesta
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is heating up her Cinco de Mayo celebration with spicy dishes inspired by rare Hatch chilies from her brother's hot pepper garden.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Miss Brown's Little Helpers
programme.desc: It's Aunt Kardea's day to hang out with some of her nieces and nephew, and she makes their favourite things along with a couple of sweet treats.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Meze Fete
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites some of his favorite chefs to the ranch to celebrate the exotic flavors and spices of the Middle East with small plates called mezes. Alex Guarnaschelli makes a delicious mix of savory and sweet with her spicy pork burger.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quarantine Edition: Leftover Takeover
programme.desc: The Kitchen is sharing amazing ways to transform leftovers with brand-new ideas plus delicious inspiration from viewers on social media. Sunny Anderson hits the grill with leftover marinara sauce and makes easy bacon and egg breakfast pizza.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Behind the Battle: Big Apple Cake
programme.desc: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman bring their incredible cake competition to the East Coast. New York City is the inspiration for cakes that will be unveiled at a Big Apple event hosted by actress Debi Mazar and news anchor Rosanna Scotto.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Behind the Battle: Dinosaur Cake
programme.desc: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman embark on the ultimate journey back in time to create the most realistic dinosaur cakes ever made as centerpieces for a fun-filled sleepover at the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Behind the Battle: Medieval Times Cake
programme.desc: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman conjure up cakes filled with special effects to celebrate the fantasy and fun of Medieval Times' 30th anniversary. Sword fighting, jousts and royal pageantry inspire them to make two of their most ambitious cakes yet.

programme.title: 51st National Stone Skipping Competition
programme.desc: Competitors try to get the most stone skips with their throw at Windemere Point Beach at the 51st Stone Skipping Competition.

programme.title: 46th Annual Cherry Pit Spitting Championship
programme.desc: Competitors attempt to spit the farthest cherry pit at the 46th Annual Cherry Pit-Spitting Competition in Eau Claire, Michigan.

programme.title: Dodge Juggle 3: Revenge of the Dodgeballs
programme.desc: Five jugglers running and juggling in hopes of keeping their juggle alive as people throw dodgeballs at them in attempt to make them slip.

programme.title: 2019 Stupid Robot Fighting League
programme.desc: Created in New Zealand by John Espin, Stupid Robot Fighting is a rather unique form of fighting that pits two life-sized hanging puppets controlled by an operator sitting behind each Stupid Robot.

programme.title: 2019 World Sign Spinning Championship
programme.desc: The 12th Annual World Sign Spinning Championship, held in Las Vegas, brought together AArrow Sign Spinners from more than 50 cities and a dozen countries to assess style, execution, and technical sign spinning ability.

programme.title: Jelle's Marble Runs
programme.desc: Teams compete in the highlight show of the 2019 championships of marble racing.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Sparkle Cadet
programme.desc: Craig, Kelsey and JP team up with an intergalactic hero named Sparkle Cadet, hoping to save the Creek from negativity.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Stink Bomb
programme.desc: The kids must evacuate the Creek due to an accidental stink bomb, and Craig takes it upon himself to rescue those stuck in the stench.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Summer Wish
programme.desc: When Craig decides to keep a lightning bug in a jar, he disrupts the delicate balance of Summer.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Craig dines at the restaurant where his older brother works and orders up a plate of REVENGE... and lots of breadsticks.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Loophole
programme.desc: When Gumball and Darwin give Bobert instructions on how to behave properly, Bobert applies his own logic to the rules.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Uncle
programme.desc: Gumball finds out the Ocho has an uncle named Mario and desperately wants to meet him.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Fuss
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are planning on seeing the scariest movie of the year, but everyone else has already seen it, and won't stop talking about it. Gumball is determined to avoid spoilers.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Heist
programme.desc: Richard discovers that going into a bank whilst wearing a motorcycle helmet can land you in a lot of trouble.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The News
programme.desc: All the breaking stories from the Elmore newsroom.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Petals
programme.desc: Gumball is the star of his own comic, but struggles to match up to his heroic alter-ego.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Vase
programme.desc: Sick of Granny Jojo's ugly gifts, Nicole encourages the kids to take matters into their own hands and accidentally break her latest hideous vase. When Gumball, Darwin and Anais try to destroy it, they discover it is more robust than it seems.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Nuisance
programme.desc: The residents of Elmore go to extreme lengths to ditch the Wattersons.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: I Am Your Brother! The Monster With Goku's Energy!
programme.desc: The Super Namekian formerly known as Piccolo faces off against the most terrifying monster the world has ever seen and is shocked when the creature claims to be his brother.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: The Dizzying Deception and the Daring Escape! Defeat the Android Cell!
programme.desc: Piccolo tricks the monster android named Cell into revealing the mysteries of his origins and his true intentions.

programme.title: American Dad!: Jenny Fromdabloc
programme.desc: After Snot professes his love for Hayley and gets shot down, Steve and Roger devise a plan to cheer him up. Roger dresses up as Steve's cousin from New Jersey, Jenny Fromdabloc, and Snot falls hard for her.

programme.title: American Dad!: License to Till
programme.desc: When Steve has trouble crossing over into the 'cool kids' social circle, Klaus and Roger place their bets to see how quickly Roger can make him cool. Everything they try backfires until Steve becomes the in-crowd's designated driver.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Ear-sy Rider
programme.desc: A biker gang hangs out at Bob's Burgers as they mourn the loss of their beloved leader. Meanwhile, Louise has an identity crisis when her bunny ears are stolen.

programme.title: Rick and Morty: The Old Man and the Seat
programme.desc: We all have one thing in common broh. I don’t know broh. Watch this one.

programme.title: Family Guy: Brian Griffin's House of Payne

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Zoo: Slow Loris Romance
programme.desc: The slow loris has a tiny window for breeding, so staff anxiously help a potential pair connect. The veterinary team develop ground-breaking techniques to treat the stoic pigeons and an okapi with a limp gets a helping hand.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback
programme.desc: A charismatic ostrich named Olga works to be reunited with her flock. Buster the squirrel monkey is introduced to the zoo's troop of feisty females. A functionally extinct species of turtle finds new life, and everyone's favorite warthog is back.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx Tales: Beloved Bugs
programme.desc: The zoo anxiously awaits the arrival of a snow leopard called K2's fourth cub. The staff is pleased when a pair of Andean condors embrace their new enclosure, while a squirmy binturong fights his annual vaccination.

programme.title: The Zoo: Cougar Cub Rescue
programme.desc: A trio of abandoned puma cubs arrives at the zoo, while the staff grows concerned that Ella, the oldest rhino, is not acting herself. Meanwhile, a Caribbean flamingo is born at the zoo after nearly two decades, and Otto the stallion makes his debut.

programme.title: Saved By the Barn: House Fire Rescue
programme.desc: Chris experiences his first rescue and saves two goats called Hugo and Emmy who are in need of serious medical attention. Joey the calf returns after a series of surgeries, and Lola the kid goat is surprised with a prosthetic.

programme.title: Saved By the Barn: Cockfight Club
programme.desc: Dan heads to Chicago to give cockfighting roosters a second chance. Later, the crew worries if DJ the cow's unruly behavior will be welcomed by the rest of the herd.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Man vs. Animal
programme.desc: As winter melts into spring, all kinds of wildlife are emerging, from baby raccoons to hungry black bears. A routine littering summons turns into a face off with a rabid pitbull. Some new evidence comes to light to revive an old deer poaching case.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rapid Responders
programme.desc: Water recreation season has the wardens out in full force. The Dive Team suits up to respond to an emergency search and recovery call, An ATV rider with a camera on his helmet films his own crash and undercover safety patrols lead to potential OUI busts.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trail of Trouble
programme.desc: An ATV trail becomes the site of a high-speed chase when a man with an outstanding warrant attempts to flee from the Maine Warden Service. With the weather warming up, the wardens deal with intentional violators and serial offenders while enforcing laws.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Takedown
programme.desc: As sportsmen arrive to take part in Maine's big game season, the wardens keep a watchful eye for night hunters and track down a deer poacher. Then, some hunters from out of state get a lesson in Maine's hunting laws.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Schoolyard Bear
programme.desc: Officer Chris McKee attempts to remove a bear from a tree in a playground, while Officer Fluette picks out his new K9 partner. Officer Lucas searches for a group of ATVs. On the snowy summit of Mt. Washington, officers search for lost hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Midsummer Mayhem
programme.desc: Officer Holmes and trainee Frye respond to an ATV accident in which a man's head has been run over. Officer McKee helps relocate a rare rattlesnake. Officer Courtney assists a dog locked inside a car. On Mt. Willard, a collapsed student needs rescuing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Invisible Evidence
programme.desc: Officer Egan investigates the mysterious death of a deer. Officer Courtney and Lt. Cheney help a seal stuck in a tidal creek. Officer Bronson catches a young fisherman in a lie. And Officers lead the search for a woman with a head injury.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: North Woods Law: A Test of Strength
programme.desc: Officer Demler helps a hiker with a severe shoulder injury. Officer Fluette and K-9 Moxie take their certification test. Officer Holmes and trainee Frye look for evidence of an illegal deer kill. Officer MacFadzen bonds with his son on a hunting trip.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Lieutenant Boudreau and trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc. Later, when a seriously ill hiker is trapped on Mount Garfield, Officer Holmes races to the scene.

programme.title: Movie: Peter Rabbit

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hurricane Neddy
programme.desc: A hurricane comes through Springfield and spares everyone but the Flanders home. After thieves loot Ned's store and his rebuilt home crumbles to the ground, Ned suffers a nervous breakdown and checks into an asylum.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: The Simpson family is ordered to see a social worker after a monopoly game goes sour.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Diatribe of a Mad Housewife
programme.desc: Inspired by a romance novelist, Marge begins writing a novel set on Nantucket Island.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Greatest Story Ever D'Ohed
programme.desc: When Homer is playing noisily in the yard, it disrupts Flanders' bible study group. Coaxed by the reverend, a frustrated Flanders takes it upon himself to redeem Homer by inviting the Simpson family on his church retreat to Jerusalem.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ned-Liest Catch
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for getting Mrs. Krabappel suspended after one of his school pranks, Bart helps her escape detention, and Ned Flanders winds up saving her life in the process.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Ned 'N' Edna's Blend
programme.desc: When the town of Springfield learns that Ned and Edna secretly got hitched, Marge offers to throw them a congratulatory reception.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Tree Grows in Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa tries to cheer up a down-in-the-dumps Homer by winning him a 'MyPad' at the school auction. But he falls back into a funk when he breaks the magical tablet device.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Peeping Mom
programme.desc: Bart lies about being involved in a bulldozer crash, so Marge decides to follow him everywhere until he confesses. Meanwhile, Homer ignores Santa's Little Helper when Flanders gets a new dog.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bull-E
programme.desc: After Bart gets bullied at the school dance, Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for bullying Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave rehab as a hero.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Left Behind
programme.desc: Homer gets Flanders a job at the plant, and he soon learns that no good deed goes unpunished when Flanders starts to insist on carpools and demands more from Homer's work performance. Meanwhile, Marge feels as though their marriage has lost its spark.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean
programme.desc: A journey from the intense heat of the tropics to the planet's frozen poles. Life has spread to almost every part of the ocean, but there are many different worlds within it, and each presents unique challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Life Story: Courtship
programme.desc: Competition to win a partner has created both the most extraordinary beauty and life-threatening violence found anywhere in nature. The stakes could not be higher: without a mate, the journey of life ends.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Galapagos
programme.desc: Travel to the most famous archipelago on Earth, the Galapagos. The islands are home bizarre and unique creatures.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Slowly Slowly Catchy Monkey
programme.desc: Eve is attempting to rebuild her life, having been shot by Villanelle. Villanelle is also moving on, until she is approached by an old foe. Carolyn is being undermined at work and Kenny can’t leave his own investigation into The Twelve alone.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Management Sucks
programme.desc: Eve and Carolyn are reeling. Eve strikes up an unlikely alliance with Kenny's colleagues at the Bitter Pill. Villanelle finds that management isn't all it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Meetings Have Biscuits
programme.desc: Villanelle agrees to a job which will take her back to London. Carolyn's Moscow contacts come in use when Eve and the Bitter Pill team unravel a potential lead to the Twelve. Konstantin finds himself under pressure from all sides.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible II

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible III

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: Alexander the Great's Lost Tomb
programme.desc: New theories may help reveal the location of Alexander the Great's tomb after 2,000 years.

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: The Real Cleopatra
programme.desc: Cleopatra is one of the ancient world's most famous and enigmatic figures; examination of her life and the city she built shows Cleopatra was not a temptress who ruled through seduction, but rather an intelligent leader and a canny politician.

programme.title: Tut's Treasures: Hidden Secrets: Golden Mask
programme.desc: King Tut's death mask, comprised of 24lbs of pure gold, is an object of great controversy. The damaged cartouche and contrasting shades of gold may mean it was not originally intended for him. It seems that his ancestor, Nefertiti, its original intended.

programme.title: Tut's Treasures: Hidden Secrets: Tales From the Tomb
programme.desc: With all 5, 398 treasures of Tutankhamun now reunited, those closest to the family's legacy began to pain a disturbing picture.

programme.title: Egypt's Sun King: Secrets and Treasures

programme.title: The True Story Of The Dating Game Killer

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Neighbors are sometimes miles apart in the tiny town of Horton, Kansas, but news travels fast when Patricia Kimmi disappears from her home. Evidence leads investigators to believe she may not be found alive. And worse, that her killer still lurks.

programme.title: He Lied About Everything
programme.desc: A world-renown surgeon lied about everything and in his wake left a dozen dead patients, shattered families, a field of medical research in disarray and caused a meltdown at the Nobel Prize for medicine.

programme.title: Web of Lies: New Year's Retribution
programme.desc: A newly single 33-year-old bursting with confidence after losing 200 pounds spends her time flirting with men online. When she fails to turn up for work one day, her friends worry that she didn't just run away with Mr. Right.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Sick Boy
programme.desc: A young mother turns to the internet desperate for help and advice when her young son mysteriously falls ill.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love Goes South
programme.desc: Lonely musician Ray Merrill thinks he's found his dream woman in Brazil through an online dating website. But as the exotic romance heats up, money starts to go missing.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Too Fast, Too Young
programme.desc: After a troubled childhood, 13-year old Christina Long's life seems to be on the up and up. Now living with her beloved Aunt Shelly, Christina is a popular honor student and cheerleader. But when her online life is revealed, it tells a more tragic story.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Control Alt Delete
programme.desc: Maribel Ramos is a US army veteran with a complicated love life. When she arranges to meet an online date, she disappears, leaving family and friends desperate for news. Detectives are left to uncover a twisted tale of jealousy and rage.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Chaos ensues in Fox Lake, Illinois when an officer is found dead. With a potential cop killer on the loose, the town is on lockdown. But when sordid details of the dead officer's secret life come out, the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Cold Blue Blood
programme.desc: Dr. Dirk Greineder is one of the most respected men in the upper class community of Wellesley, Massachusetts… that is, until a secret X-rated addiction spirals out of control and results in a gruesome murder no one saw coming.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Mastermind
programme.desc: LAPD investigators are on the hunt for a criminal stealing expensive yachts, but what they find instead is a mild mannered man among their own ranks… who's involved in a lot more than just boat theft.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Serial Deception
programme.desc: When dozens of women vanish from the sunshine state in the late 60s, they're presumed runways. It isn't until police discover the bodies of two missing teens that they uncover the sadistic work of a prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: An Uphill Battle
programme.desc: Lifelong Mainers bought their Belgrade cabin in 1987 and have maintained it over the years, but the list of needed repairs continues to grow. Chase and the team give the camp much-needed life by rebuilding its front wall and replacing the heating system.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: True Brew: The Reload
programme.desc: A lot has happened in the world of coffee since this show dropped in 2000; since then, Alton Brownhas brewed (and consumed) a lot of coffee. Here's his new look at roasting, grinding, brewing and thegear you need to do it.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Art Of Darkness II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic cocoa powder show with three updated dishes including a new twist on brownies, an introduction to black cardamom and a scientific road race.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Food Fantasy
programme.desc: Imagination roams free at these amazing dining spots.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Great Spaces
programme.desc: Take a tour of the most unique places and spaces in dining today. From a food truck serving the most delectable Korean/Mexican dishes on four wheels, to a LEED-certified bowling-alley-come-music-venue boasting it's own special Blue Ribbon menu.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Brunch

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cool Cookie Sandwiches

programme.title: Cake Wars: Cobra's Curse
