programme.title: Cake Wars: Halo
programme.desc: Get ready for the biggest battle the gaming world has ever seen, as four incredible bakers create action-packed cakes celebrating one of the biggest video games in the world, Halo!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Desserts to Die For
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the most delectable, distinctive and to-die-for dessert dishes around. They have the power to take diners back in time, back home or even to places they've never been before.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chengdu
programme.desc: From the blistering 'Hot Pot' and fiery Mapo Tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.desc: By keeping their core roster intact and adding former NBA MVP and three-time NBA scoring champ, Kevin Durant, the Warriors were able to bring the NBA trophy back to the Bay Area for the second time in three seasons.

programme.title: Beyond the Paint
programme.desc: Matt Winer visits with Chicago native Dwyane Wade, who touches on the tragic murder of his cousin as he first arrived in Chicago. In the piece, Hall of Famer and fellow Chicago native Isiah Thomas also weighs in on Chicago's recent gun violence.

programme.title: The Timeline: '91 Falcons
programme.desc: Look back at the 1991 Atlanta Falcons, which head coach Jerry Glanville dubbed 'the most fun team ever in pro football.'

programme.title: The Timeline: The Greatest Show on Turf
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the St. Louis Rams' record breaking offense that pushed the team to two Super Bowl appearances and a Super Bowl title in three seasons.

programme.title: The Timeline: The Helmet Catch
programme.desc: Look back at David Tyree's incredible catch in Super Bowl XLII that played a key part in the New York Giants' win and ended New England's perfect season.

programme.title: The Timeline: The Tuck Rule
programme.desc: The story behind the controversial play call that secured a playoff victory for the Patriots in a season that ended with a New England Super Bowl win.

programme.title: The Timeline: Favre Returns
programme.desc: Once universally loved by the NFL's smallest town, Brett Favre was roundly booed when he entered Lambeau wearing the rival Minnesota Vikings' purple and gold. Favre has not been back since. Until now.

programme.title: The Timeline: Jersey Guys
programme.desc: The story of how the New York Giants found their way to the swamps of New Jersey, and how a Jersey Guy helped them find their identity to begin the rebirth of an iconic football franchise.

programme.title: The Timeline: The Ice Bowl
programme.desc: Relive the incredible playoff matchup between Tom Landry's Dallas Cowboys and Vince Lombardi's Green Bay Packers.

programme.title: The Timeline: A Tale of Two Cities
programme.desc: The parallel stories of two great American cities, Dallas and San Francisco, and the rise of their two football teams that would go on to battle for NFL supremacy over the course of three decades.

programme.title: The Timeline: A Tale of Two Cities
programme.desc: Having each reached the pinnacle of football glory, the Cowboys and 49ers go on to become the greatest NFL rivalry of the Super Bowl era.

programme.title: The Timeline: The Merger
programme.desc: The story of the unprecedented merger between the National Football League and the upstart American Football League, giving birth to the modern-day NFL and the uniquely American spectacle called the Super Bowl.

programme.title: The Timeline: America's Game and the Iran Hostage Crisis
programme.desc: In 1980 an American reporter makes a crude recording of Super Bowl XIV which he plans to smuggle into the Tehran embassy, and into the hearts and minds of those who need it the most.

programme.desc: The fantasy impact of the NFL Draft and what rookies you need to keep an eye on.

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Martin takes steps to ensure that he gets on Varnel Hill's talk show.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Ooh Baby, Baby

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Boxing Helena
programme.desc: The whole family joins a health club and Will gets beaten up by a female boxer.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Clownius
programme.desc: Will and Carlton act as bodyguards after Uncle Phil receives threatening calls.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do
programme.desc: Philip's political career affects Vivian, and Ashley is given a modeling opportunity.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Bowl Buster

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Butler's Son Did It

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Hare Today
programme.desc: Phillip accidentally kills Nicky's pet rabbit while Carleton and Ashley compete to sing.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Stank Horse
programme.desc: Will takes Carlton, Ashley and Hilary to the racetrack for a fun day at the races.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Stank Hole in One

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Eye, Tooth
programme.desc: Will and Carleton almost ruin everything for Hilary's show; Ashley wants to move to NY.

programme.title: Movie: What's Love Got to Do With It?
programme.desc: The turbulent relationship between rock legend Tina Turner and her husband, Ike. As a musical team, Ike and Tina take the charts by storm, but as his physical abuse worsens, Tina has to make the tough decision to leave Ike and set out on her own.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Atlanta: Queen of Atlanta
programme.desc: Akbar goes to war with LightSkinKeisha over her throne as queen of Atlanta. Scrappy and Bambi seek peace for their family, but their moms have other plans in mind. Newbie Kiyomi Leslie is on the scene. And Shooter juggles his messy love life.

programme.title: Movie: Over the Moon in Love
programme.desc: With her match-making business on the verge of closing, Brooklyn finds herself in the unique position to be featured in a magazine. But first, she has to set up the writer with her childhood friend Devin.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Safari
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa, she travels there to meet with the head Ranger. Upon learning that the park is in financial jeopardy, and may have to be sold to her uncle's competitor, he urges her to take on a Safari.

programme.title: Good Witch: The Anniversary
programme.desc: As Cassie and Sam prepare to celebrate their first wedding anniversary, Cassie welcomes Grey House guest Joy, who seems to be spying on the Merriwicks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Isn't it Romantic
programme.desc: Dorothy's old friend, Jean comes to Miami for a visit and Dorothy decides not to tell Blanche and Rose that Jean is a lesbian. Then, after spending time with Rose, Jean begins to fall for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy's Little Lady
programme.desc: Blanche's dad announces he's remarrying; Rose and Dorothy enter a song-writing contest.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Family Affair
programme.desc: A generational clash occurs when Dorothy's son Michael and Rose's daughter Bridget visit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Vacation
programme.desc: The girls' dream vacation in the Caribbean turns out to be far from what was advertised in the brochure. While the girls are away, Sophia romances the gardener.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Joust Between Friends
programme.desc: Laid off from work, Dorothy searches for part-time work which leads to Blanche getting her a job at the museum. Then fur flies when Dorothy is handed the job of organizing a banquet, the duty Blanche was hoping for.

programme.title: Frasier: I'm Listening
programme.desc: Frasier overhears his father's girlfriend making a date with another man.

programme.title: Frasier: Maris Returns
programme.desc: Niles is shocked when his ex-wife Maris re-enters his life, but he doesn't tell Daphne.

programme.title: Frasier: Murder Most Maris
programme.desc: Niles is a suspected accomplice when his ex-wife is arrested for murdering her lover.

programme.title: Frasier: Guns 'N Neuroses
programme.desc: One thing leads to another when Lilith's friend sets her up on a blind date with Frasier.

programme.title: Frasier: Seabee Jeebies
programme.desc: When his ex-wife Maris is accused of murder, the media frenzy makes Niles a celebrity.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier-Lite
programme.desc: The gang competes against another radio station to see who can lose the most pounds.

programme.title: Frasier: The Ann Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: An accident at home forces Frasier to care for a woman with whom he had a bad date.

programme.title: Frasier: Freudian Sleep
programme.desc: The Cranes go to the mountains and everyone dreams about their worries and fears.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy's Italian Movie
programme.desc: Lucy tramples grapes to get into the mood for a role in an upcoming Italian movie.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy's Bicycle Trip
programme.desc: While biking, Lucy loses her passport and is unable to cross the Italian-French border.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Goes to Monte Carlo

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Return Home From Europe
programme.desc: Homeward bound from Europe, Lucy tries to get out of paying overweight charges on the plane by disguising a big piece of Italian cheese as a baby--much to the consternation of the new mother seated next to her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love, Rose

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 'Twas the Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: The girls each plan to spend Christmas with their families but a series of strange occurrences lead them to spend Christmas together in Miami.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Sisters
programme.desc: As a birthday present for Sophia, Dorothy brings Sophia's sister over from Sicily.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Stan Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Dorothy feels sympathy for Stan when he tells her he's going to have open heart surgery. However that sympathy fades when she learns of his many infidelities while they were married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Actor
programme.desc: The girls vie for the attention of a famous TV actor when he stars in a local play.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Television host Carrie Ann Inab visits. Actor Reno Wilson talks about his movie, 'Bolden.' From 'America's Test Kitchen,' Julia Collin Davison and Bridget Lancaster upgrade our summer salads.

programme.title: Movie: Like Cats & Dogs
programme.desc: A cat lover and dog lover are both heading to same beach for two different reasons. He is there to work on his thesis and she is there to escape the shambles of her life.

programme.title: Movie: From Friend to Fiancé

programme.desc: A savvy NYPD cop is recruited by a secret government organization to help control Earth's alien population.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.desc: An ex-cop and a self-described wild child clash over cuddling in the Panamanian jungle. When the challenge overwhelms one of them, the other must forage, trap and even kill to keep a glimmer of hope alive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Deserted and Dehydrated
programme.desc: A hunter from Louisiana meets a surfer girl on a deserted island of the Philippines. With very little water to tap into, dehydration soon sets in and the duo spends most of their time securing a water source.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: 21 Miles, 21 Days
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: A biker chick and a taxidermist have to stay on the move to survive in a lethal African hunting ground. The pair must make their way across 21 miles of savannah to find food and water while avoiding a pride of lions.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Honeymoon From Hell
programme.desc: A married couple goes from watching the challenge from their couch in Idaho to taking it on in the perilous Philippine jungle. Torrential rain, relentless bugs and deadly boars put their survival skills, and their marriage to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Swamp Redemption
programme.desc: Jeremy, a former Naked and Afraid survivalist, returns for his chance at redemption in the haunted swamps of Louisiana and is joined by Michelle, an Air Force veteran. Trouble hits the partnership early on.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: The Haunting
programme.desc: Jeremy and Melanie continue the hardest challenge of their lives in the haunted swamps of Louisiana. They must endure constant threats from predators, while desperately trying to secure food to keep them going.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Honeymoon From Hell
programme.desc: A married couple goes from watching the challenge from their couch in Idaho to taking it on in the perilous Philippine jungle. Torrential rain, relentless bugs and deadly boars put their survival skills, and their marriage to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Lord of the Rats

programme.title: Flipped: A Mobster Tells All: Michael 'Mikey Flattop' DeRosa

programme.title: Flipped: A Mobster Tells All: Kenny 'Kenji' Gallo
programme.desc: Loyalty, honour, family meant nothing to Kenji. He simply loved living life dangerously. So when the FBI caught up with him, Kenji offered to fly to New York, wear a wire and bring down some of the heaviest hitters of the Colombo Crime Family.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection: Truck Yeah

programme.title: Iron Resurrection: C10 Again
programme.desc: With a deadline quickly approaching, the shop struggles to fit a gigantic ex-NFL player into a tiny 1967 Chevy C10. This oversized job includes a customized leather interior, automated bed cover and a transformative paint job.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection: Tricked Out Trike
programme.desc: Joe is world renowned for building badass motorcycles, but on this build, he's pushing his engineering chops to the limit by building a monster trike that would look right at home on the set of a Mad Max movie.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection: Nova Overload
programme.desc: Shag and Amanda get a '65 Chevy II Nova for a steal, but as the team digs in, rat nests and rust are the least of their worries. The build requires a complete overhaul and has them wondering if they bit off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection: Nova Overload

programme.desc: In an episode directed by award-winning film actor, Andy Garcia, George tries to relive his high school days by teaching Max to play the guitar, but when Max moves on without his dad and joins a rock band, George wishes he could take it all back.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Gets Smoking Mad at Benny and Develops an Oral Fixation
programme.desc: When Power Aviation institutes a smoking ban, Benny's nicotine withdrawals drive George to self-destructive behaviour.

programme.title: Full House: Another Opening, Another No-Show
programme.desc: Jesse has the grand opening of his club, but gets locked in the storeroom with Kimmy.

programme.title: Full House: The Day of the Rhino
programme.desc: Michelle is cheated by a TV ad and protests; the girls teach the guys a lesson in lying.

programme.title: Full House: Joey's Funny Valentine
programme.desc: Joey's new girlfriend embarrasses the family by joking about them in her comedy routine.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pup Pup Boogie/ Pups in the Fog
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol races to fix the train tracks and remove the train car before the next train comes along. The Patrol must hurry to fix the bulb in the lighthouse so Cap'n Turbot can return safely in the fog.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Jake's Cake/ Pups Save a Wild Ride
programme.desc: Ryder and the Pups need to help get a surprise birthday ice cream cake up to Jake's cabin.Alex and Daring Danny X are snowboarding right for Risky Ridge and need help from the PAW Patrol.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Bubble Duckies!
programme.desc: Today the Bubble Guppies are watching a whole bunch of birds take flight! But when a family of flying ducks gets lost in a storm cloud, it’s up to Molly, Gil and a friendly little duck named Beep to fly in and rescue them!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Rockin' Out
programme.desc: Goby and Gil go on a quest to get a geode at the top of a volcano. They try to make it back to the Rocky Valley Rock Show in time to enter the contest for best rock.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: ABC's With Blue
programme.desc: We are reading Blue's Clues to figure out what book Blue wants to read for story time. While looking for clues, we practice letter recognition and sound, help Mr. Salt & Mrs. Pepper with their grocery list and skidoo into a book.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Stinky Flower/ Pups Save a Monkey-Naut
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger drops off a 'gift' to Mayor Goodway, a flower that spreads a horrible stink when it blooms.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Meet the Mighty Twins/ Save the Mega Mayor
programme.desc: Super-bandit Ladybird shrieks havoc in Adventure Bay, taking all of the town's treasures including Mayor Goodway. The Mighty Pups team up with new super pals The Mighty Twins to save the day, and the Mayor.

programme.title: Ryan's Mystery Playdate: Ryan's Foamy Playdate/ Ryan's Sweet Treat Playdate
programme.desc: It's about to get coco-lossal in the playroom as Ryan stirs his way through challenges before mixing up some flavorful designs. Later, Ryan's gotta get his dessert on in order to get to his confectionary playdate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Curse of Bikini Bottom / Squidward in Clarinetland
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick disturb the Flying Dutchman's slumber and he turns them into ghosts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Handemonium/ Breakin'
programme.desc: SpongeBob takes his first break.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy go away for the weekend; Bob becomes a stand-up comic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid's Visit/ To Squarepants or Not to Squarepants
programme.desc: SpongeBob decorates his home like Squidward's so that his neighbour will visit. All of SpongeBob's square pants have shrunk in the dryer, and he can't find any square pants anywhere.

programme.title: The Loud House: Pulp Friction/ Pets Peeved
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis. When Lana brings home a new pet, who the kids adore, the four original Loud pets scheme to get rid of him.

programme.title: The Loud House: Net Gains/ Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Lynn desperately wants to win a basketball championship but gets drafted onto a terrible team. Mom and Dad are sick of waiting in the long bathroom line so they decide to build a secret bathroom.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fast Feud/ Never Friending Story
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula. Mr. Krabs uses Gary to find spare change.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sleepy Time/ The Great Snail Race
programme.desc: SpongeBob suddenly possesses the amazing ability to visit the dreams of his friends and neighbors. Squidward gets a pure-bread snail, Snelle, and decides to race her in the snail races.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gary's Got Legs/ Gary and Spot
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. Sandy narrates the nocturnal adventures of Gary and his secret pal, Spot.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shell Games/ Senior Discount
programme.desc: When Old Man Jenkins disrupts business at the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs cant find a way to kick him out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid on Strike/ Sandy, SpongeBob and the Worm
programme.desc: SpongeBob is petrified by a huge worm and tells Sandy, who drags him into confronting it.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: You Are Never Safe
programme.desc: When snow squalls attack Highway 402, Gary, Collin and Mark must work deep in the trees. A fuel tanker rolls next to rail lines in Toronto's industrial port lands. The Chatham crew deals with a fire-ravaged wreck.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Always Makes My Knees Knock
programme.desc: Mitch's partnership with his brother is put to the test in a brutal storm's aftermath. Erick, Derek and crew take on a load of steep pies which may spring loose on the road. Andrew and his team wrestle difficult cargo.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: It's a Rush Every Time
programme.desc: Gary's crew and family come together for a multi-wreck scene at the border. A delicate recovery in Toronto is complicated by low power lines and a bad fuel leak. A garbage hauler makes a heavy mess for the Ross Crew.

programme.desc: In Louisville, a Sudanese man is shot to death while working in his clothing store. In Birmingham, a young man is shot dead in his home and his girlfriend is shot multiple times but lives. The detectives hit the streets to find the criminals responsible.

programme.title: The First 48: Blood on the Streets
programme.desc: In Miami, the homicide team investigates a triple shooting on a crowded bus that injured two and left a teenager dead.

programme.title: Live PD
programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Hustle vs. Muscle
programme.desc: A muscle-bound competitive eater and his new fiancée appear to have the edge in the pepperdome as they go against a duo of brothers who'll have to put their sibling rivalry aside if they want to walk away with the cash.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Gordon Ramsay
programme.desc: Host Sean Evans and his guests eat progressively spicy chicken wings.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Gina Yashere Headlines
programme.desc: Gina Yashere headlines as Neko White has a run-in with the new Sherriff in town. Plus, Alex Scott teaches how to take cover and Tacarra Williams gets a fight in her son's bedroom.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Janelle James Headlines
programme.desc: The always funny Janelle James headlines tonight. Plus, Blaq Ron gives a brief history lesson on line dancing, Kerry Coddett contemplates alternate styles of dating and Reggie Conquest has a PSA for kids.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Chris Redd Headlines
programme.desc: Funny man Chris Redd headlines as the always hilarious Donnell Rawlings jokes about his time in the military. Plus, Chanel Ali sets off new hair trends in the workplace.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Losing My Religion
programme.desc: Correy Bell makes tumbling down the stairs look sexy, and Dave Helem has a message for substitute teachers. Plus, Pretty Ricki puts the 'C'' in crazy' and Dave Temple has a church experience he'll never forget.

programme.title: Movie: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: After Letty is killed, Dom returns to America in search of her killer. Brian is an FBI agent who is on the same trail as Dom, which leads to a drug ring and Letty's killer. Infiltrating the driver ranks, Dom and Brian try to get to the bottom things.

programme.title: Botched: Not OK From the UK
programme.desc: A UK patient with a duck butt and bulging belly forces Dr. Dubrow to perform a two-stage revision to restore her 24-year-old body. Meanwhile, another Brit needs Dr. Nassif's help to complete his K-Pop transformation.

programme.title: Botched: Flipped Out Butt and a Pelican Neck
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a patient who is flippin' out over her flippin' butt implants, while Dr. Nassif tries to save a patient with a wrecked pelican neck. Meanwhile, a wannabe trophy wife seeks a bigger booty to find the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Botched: Playground Trauma and a Pint-Sized Mama
programme.desc: A pint-sized Irish model travels across the pond for larger breasts while the doctors help a woman who almost died from a nightmarish tummy tuck. A young father with a busted nose hopes the docs can give him a nose just like his daughter's.

programme.title: Botched: Muscles, Tucks and Forehead Flaps
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif takes on a patient who tried to treat her own skin cancer and ended up with a hole in her nose while Dr. Dubrow tackles a body builder's deflated breast.

programme.title: Botched: Lumpy Lipo and Slippy Nippy
programme.desc: A woman with a 'side nipple' issue visits the doctors. A car accident leaves another woman's face disfigured. A previous patient comes back to the doctors, hoping to look more like a celebrity idol.

programme.title: Botched: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a patient who's had an implant removed three times, leaving her with one breast. Dr. Nassif assists a patient who received a surprise nose job in Peru. A UK deejay and firebreather hopes for heel implants to increase their height.

programme.title: Botched: Nothing Butt Trouble
programme.desc: A young woman visits the doctors and multiple silicone removal surgeries have left her with a distorted derriere, while a leggy painter needs her nose fixed to help lift her mother's guilty conscience.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Decisions, Decisions
programme.desc: Rob struggles to find a way to be civil with Chyna, Khloe puts Kourtney through a series of tests to cure her indecisiveness, and Kim jets to New York with Kylie for Kanye's highly-anticipated Yeezy fashion show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Royalties and Loyalties
programme.desc: Kim is torn over maintaining a relationship with Cait and decides to first confirm that her mom's reason for cutting ties is valid. Kendall introduces her sisters to the first openly gay royal whose life story hits close to home with the family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sister Surrogacy
programme.desc: Khloé explores the possibility of becoming Kim's surrogate, but receives some shocking news about her own fertility in the process. Meanwhile, the sisters pressure Kourtney to step her flirting game up, and Rob threatens to bail on his 30th birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney finally get a glimpse into Khloé's private life in Cleveland. Meanwhile, Kendall receives some harsh feedback on a recent project and the family is blindsided when Cait reveals some shocking news.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: MILFs Gone Wild
programme.desc: Scott isn't happy when Kourtney goes on a girls' trip to Mexico to celebrate her birthday. Kim isn't impressed when some less than flattering photos of her time in Mexico find their way onto the web.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cheers to That!
programme.desc: Kim's confidence is still shaken up from the Mexico trip. Khloe wants mother-daughter bonding time and isn't impressed when Kris has no time for it. Kourtney is keeping her dating life on the down low.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?

programme.title: Sex and the City: A Woman's Right to Shoes
programme.desc: Carrie's expensive new shoes go missing when she attends a friend's baby shower.

programme.title: Movie: Sex and the City

programme.desc: A couple was about to become empty nesters before he accepted a high-profile CEO position that will move them from Denver to Tampa. They have just three days to find a house that's perfect for entertaining clients before his position starts in six weeks.

programme.title: Hawaii Life: Dreams Come True in Maui
programme.desc: After 25 years of dreaming, a California couple is finally ready to move to the sandy beaches of Maui. They both love the Lahaina area and would love to own a boat to put in the harbor.

programme.title: Hawaii Life: Oahu's Aloha Spirit
programme.desc: A recently married Puerto Rico couple misses the aloha spirit of their Hawaiian hometown. They quickly jump at the opportunity to move back home to Oahu and buy their first house together.

programme.title: Island Life: Working Hard For the Hamptons
programme.desc: A career-driven couple is looking to make the leap from Greenwich, Connecticut, to their island fantasy destination of East Hampton, New York, where they can finally enjoy the fruits of their labor and live their island life.

programme.title: Island Life: Reliving Childhood Memories On Martha's Vineyard

programme.title: Good Bones: Tiny House, Huge Transformation
programme.desc: A very small house poses big problems for Mina and Karen.

programme.title: Good Bones: A Neighborhood Eyesore That's Horrible Before Becomes an Amazing After
programme.desc: After purchasing a house from the city for only $4,000, Mina and Karen know they might have a lot of work in front of them. They discover detrimental water damage, horrific smells and questionable water lines.

programme.title: Good Bones: Duplex Remodel Is Double the Trouble

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wild Thing

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Avengers Assemble

programme.title: Pawn Stars: McQueen Dreams

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawned and Confused
programme.desc: A seller brings his Led Zeppelin vinyl collection to Rick and Chum. A fancy 19th century office desk may be a worthwhile buy. A game-used base from the 2016 World Series could be a home run for the guys. Rick takes a trip to see 'The Object.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Blades of Deal
programme.desc: A 1984 Ferrari 308 is a find Rick can't wait to drive away with, provided he can make a deal. Corey examines a phone-operated music player that dates back to the 1930s. A cowboy hat formerly owned by Larry Hagman ('Dallas') has Rick excited.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sign of the Times
programme.desc: Rick Dale joins Rick to prove to Corey that he struck oil with an old Gulf sign. Then, a 1930s collectible from the Indy 500 sends Chumlee racing, and Corey snoops out what might be a Charles Schulz original illustration of Charlie Brown, and more.

programme.title: Mom: Mashed Potatoes and a Little Nitrous
programme.desc: Bonnie goes to extremes to keep a major secret from Christy.

programme.title: Mom: Sick Popes and a Red Ferrari
programme.desc: After Bonnie's relapse, the women from her meeting rally around to help her through withdrawal from painkillers but Christy wants no part of it.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Like Us
programme.desc: Dre and Bow are furious after Diane isn't lit properly in her class photo. Diane doesn't want to make it a big deal, but they decide to talk to the principal about the need for sensitivity toward all complexions.

programme.title: Black-ish: Waltz in a Minor
programme.desc: Dre's teenage cousin Kyra needs a place to stay and the Johnsons decide to take her in, but they have different approaches to helping her adjust to suburban life. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane try to vet Kyra on social media to get information on her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Dreamgirls and Boys
programme.desc: Dre and Bow struggle with the changing times of identity politics and gender neutrality. Diane auditions for the school play and scores the male lead part, but her crush starts spending time with another girl.

programme.title: Movie: The Other Woman
programme.desc: A woman thinks she's found the perfect guy, until she accidentally meets the wife he's been cheating on and the two women become fast friends. After learning about yet another girl he's lying to, the three women team up to exact sweet revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five friends celebrating a bachelorette weekend at a beach house in Miami have their lives turn upside down when they accidentally kill a male stripper. After illegally moving the body they go to crazy lengths to cover things up and avoid jail time.

programme.title: Movie: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Four friends who have grown apart take a trip to the Essence Festival in New Orleans where they plan to rekindle their lifelong bonds with each other. Their wild sides come out, and they experience a trip like none that they've ever had before.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Former IMF agent Ethan Hunt is on a new mission. He must rescue a fellow agent from dangerous arms dealer Owen Davian. Hunt must rely on a new cast of agents and some old friends to help save the day.

programme.title: Movie: White House Down
programme.desc: A man recently denied his dream job of protecting the President of the United States ironically finds himself in the middle of chaos as he struggles to save his daughter, the president and the rest of the country.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Still Got It
programme.desc: Eve is trying to patch up things with Niko. Villanelle receives good news about her upcoming promotion but can't shake the feeling that there's still something missing from her life. Dasha seeks a solution to Villanelle's erratic behavior.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible II

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: In the Cards
programme.desc: Jake and Nog risk an intergalactic incident in an innocent quest to lift Sisko's spirits.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: A Call to Arms
programme.desc: The Cardassians and Dominion launch an attack on DS:9 when the Worm Hole is mined.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: A Time to Stand
programme.desc: Sisko and his crew embark on a secret mission in a captured Jem'Hadar warship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Sons and Daughters

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Rocks and Shoals
programme.desc: Sisko and his crew are stranded on a planet with a dying Vorta and a group of Jem'Hadar.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Behind the Lines

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Favor the Bold

programme.desc: The alternative universe double of Kira's slain love requests asylum on Deep Space Nine.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Bunny Nose Job
programme.desc: While Dr. K and Dr. Diaz are at a veterinary conference, Dr. Thielen is on her own.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: A Bad Case of Rotten Eggs
programme.desc: Broward Avian and Exotic Animal Hospital takes on a variety of exotic animal cases, including a hedgehog, a corn snake and an egg-bound sulcata tortoise.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Into the Fox Hole
programme.desc: Exotic animals are different from dogs and cats in many ways including the fact that they often don't show signs of sickness until they are in grave danger. Dr. K never knows what she's going to get.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Leave It to Lemur
programme.desc: While Dr. K and Dr. Diaz are at a veterinary conference, Dr. Thielen will be on her own. The minute the seasoned doctors are off to the conference, Dr. Thielen gets an emergency call from a client with a lemur.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Pot-Bellied Pig Out
programme.desc: Dr. K jumps into action when a guinea pig arrives having a seizure. Dr. Diaz treats an electrical burn in a ferret's mouth and Dr. Thielen helps a mother say goodbye.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dog-a-POL-ooza
programme.desc: It’s all dogs all day this week at Pol Veterinary Services. Dogs are an incredibly important part of the Pols’ life, as both personal pets and clients. From unclaimed strays to nosey farm dogs, there’s no pup Dr. Pol and crew won’t treat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Back to the Suture
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: My Fair Piggy
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair is just around the corner, which means Dr. Pol, Dr. Emily and Dr. Brenda are busy treating fair animals, making sure they are in tiptop shape for competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: The staff of Pol Vet Services has one head scratcher after another, from the peculiar to the downright bizarre. With over 19,000 clients, it's only a matter of time before the vets are presented with a unique case that they've never seen before.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Goose on the Loose
programme.desc: Dr. Hodges is in surgery when a baby goat in distress comes to the office.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Unearthed: Draining the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech is helping experts investigate the mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle like never before, and as new discoveries reveal alien phenomena at the bottom of the ocean floor, they might finally uncover the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Draining the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech is helping experts investigate the mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle like never before, and as new discoveries reveal alien phenomena at the bottom of the ocean floor, they might finally uncover the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Gas Giant
programme.desc: Jupiter is hotter than it should be and scientists don't understand why; the Curiosity Rover finds something strange on Mars; detectives turn to NASA for help with a murder cold case.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Ghosts on a Comet
programme.desc: When a Chinese moon rover breaks down, a NASA scientist points to a mysterious material that seemed to sabotage the Apollo missions decades earlier. The Rosetta spacecraft finds a comet that appears to be singing.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens vs. Stalin at Area 51
programme.desc: When a former Area 51 insider alleges that the Roswell UFO incident was a nefarious Soviet conspiracy masterminded by Stalin, experts investigate if it was indeed an enemy plot against America, or whether the confession is just another cover-up.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Red Storm Rising
programme.desc: Two astronauts trapped in the vacuum of space face an agonizing death; the first close up images of Pluto reveal an alien landscape, and residents of Houston struggle to explain videos of unidentified flying lights captured above their city at night.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Nazis on the Moon
programme.desc: A Russian probe discovers something has disturbed the lunar soil before the US or the USSR got there.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Are We Alone?: Black Knight Rises
programme.desc: Mysterious tracks are found on the surface of Mars. Plus, a UFO may have stalked astronauts on the space shuttle Endeavor and on the moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon that Disappeared
programme.desc: Recently discovered documents reveal NASA's secret plan B for failure of the first moon landing. A Soyuz capsule carrying NASA astronaut Peggy Whitson back to Earth vanishes without explanation.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Mars's Deepest Secret
programme.desc: British astronomers working for the CIA intercept Soviet photos of the moon. A malfunction on the ISS could poison its crew with deadly ammonia gas. A startling image taken by a NASA probe points to evidence that life could exist on Mars.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dancing with Death
programme.desc: Wife and mother of three Stephanie Roller Bruner has a wonderful life, so her disappearance days before Thanksgiving leads to a massive search. When information of a secret love triangle comes out, the case takes a drastic turn.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Two-Faced
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a San Francisco businessman is found floating in the California Aqueduct. Investigators initially suspect a family member, but without evidence, the case goes cold. It will take detectives several decades to find the real killer.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Girl in the Window
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford lives a quiet, country life in Arkansas with her husband Dennis and their two young kids. Their love story takes a devastating turn when they get a visit from police, unveiling a double life of crime so heinous it rips the marriage apart.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lady in the Pool
programme.desc: A funeral director in Denver, Pennsylvania, calls 911 to report that he just found his wife's body at the bottom of their swimming pool.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Murder on the Tracks
programme.desc: Robert Limon is murdered in a seemingly random attack while working on the railroad. Robert's sister Christina is distraught and desperate for answers. Years later detectives uncover a sinister plot to murder him involving those closest to Robert.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: One of Us
programme.desc: A young records clerk at the Seattle police department is murdered on her way to work her overnight shift. Police ty to find the evidence to catch the killer of one of their own.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Never the Same
programme.desc: A mother and her teenage daughter are savagely murdered in their own home. Among the only clues police find in the nightmarish crime scene are a bloody bare footprint and an unharmed three-year-old girl with a heartbreaking story.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Murder on the Tracks
programme.desc: Robert Limon is murdered in a seemingly random attack while working on the railroad. Robert's sister Christina is distraught and desperate for answers. Years later detectives uncover a sinister plot to murder him involving those closest to Robert.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: One of Us
programme.desc: A young records clerk at the Seattle police department is murdered on her way to work her overnight shift. Police ty to find the evidence to catch the killer of one of their own.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Life Halted
programme.desc: When a young woman is savagely murdered in her own home, police and her family must find the clue hidden inside the blood-stained crime scene that will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lady in the Pool
programme.desc: A funeral director in Denver, Pennsylvania, calls 911 to report that he just found his wife's body at the bottom of their swimming pool.

programme.title: Home Alone: Ex-ecutioner
programme.desc: When a single mom breaks up with her volatile boyfriend, she finds out he has other plans for her. Armed with a gun, he holds her hostage. As her life hangs in the balance, she has no idea her friend on the SWAT team is determined to save her.

programme.title: Home Alone: First Flame
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox is excited to start her senior year of high school after ending her abusive relationship with her boyfriend Adam. Unable to take the rejection, Adam breaks into her house with a bottle of gasoline and a lighter.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Terror in Waupaca
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted while playing outside her grandmother's house.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Alone with Evil
programme.desc: A young mother is strangled to death during her overnight shift at an office building.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Lethal Offer
programme.desc: A deadly predator leaves a trail of destruction in his wake, and a teenage girl holds the key to solving this case.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Apartment 23
programme.desc: With graduation nearing at Northeastern University, students are alarmed at the discovery of a fellow co-ed shot to death in her apartment. Detectives face many challenges in the investigation until they realize the answer is right in front of them.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: When beautiful young mother Danielle Jennings is found strangled to death in her apartment, detectives immediately believe she knew her attacker -- until a witness comes forward with a ringer of a clue that leads them to an unthinkable monster.

programme.title: American Nightmare: The Answering Machine
programme.desc: When a charitable, up-and-coming actress is savagely murdered in her home, police believe an angry, revenge-hungry killer is responsible. No one could expect the lies, obsessions, and evidence that will be uncovered in this shocking cold case.

programme.title: American Nightmare: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Winter in Iowa gets an extra chill when Shirley Wilson's son finds her stabbed to death in her home. With no forced entry, detectives believe this grandmother of 12 knew her assailant, leaving the family wondering who has betrayed them in cold blood.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: The New England chills of the New Year bite even more brutally when a mother and daughter are savagely murdered in their Woburn, MA home. With several suspects on the line, detectives take a shot in the dark in order to solve this nightmare of a mystery.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: The Sickness
programme.desc: Sue always dreamed of her own little quiet piece of paradise, but her dreams go up in smoke when a sinister guest comes knocking on August 27, 2001.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Wild Goose Chase
programme.desc: When Marlys Sather doesn't return to work after a lunch appointment, her family makes a horrifying discovery. The cops search for the person who set fire to this loving mother of three.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Red Mustang
programme.desc: When 22-year-old LeAnne Martinez fails to pick up her daughter from her mother's house, her family worries. Her red Mustang is missing, and what they find inside her home will leave them forever scarred.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Ancient UFO Encounters
programme.desc: Uncovering new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials and influenced ancient technologies, architecture and art.

programme.title: Military UFO Encounters
programme.desc: When it comes to identifying mysterious, unknown objects in our skies, there are few more qualified than pilots and astronauts. Through amazing first-hand accounts we'll learn that sightings by these experts are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: Deep Sea UFO Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting our oceans.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the guys sit down to talk about a few of their favourite things: cabins and barns. With special guests, never-before-seen footage and hilarious outtakes, the builders are having fun. Mark also talks about his new house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Sweet Home Louisiana
programme.desc: The guys transform a timber frame barn into a modern home for an architect in Louisiana.

programme.desc: A New England couple is ready to buy a bigger home for their growing family. Once renovations begin on their home, they quickly realize they may be in way over their heads.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: Beach Budget Blowout
programme.desc: A Manhattan Beach, California, family of five hopes to stay close to the beach while finding more space. Affordable homes in their dream location all require renovation.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Behind the Build: HGTV Smart Home
programme.desc: Tiffany Brooks and Jason Pickens offer a behind-the-build tour of HGTV Smart Home 2020 in the leafy suburb of Wexford, Pennsylvania. See how this design-build duo collaborates on the high-tech Craftsman home with industrial touches and a modern flair.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Massive Mud Home
programme.desc: Summer and Jack moved away from New Jersey after getting engaged to live off the grid. They buy a plot of land in Sedro Wooley, Washington and have commissioned Sunray Kelley to design and build their dream mud home.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin Wanderlust
programme.desc: A young cabin builder creates a one-of-a-kind cabin in upstate New York during the harsh winter months. Due to the new and complicated design, the crew must adapt to the environment, work efficiently and leave no room for mistakes.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cob Cottage
programme.desc: After years of apprenticing, Sonia is putting her skills to the test by building her first house: an off-grid cob cottage on top of an Oregon mountain. Her lack of experience and the Pacific Northwest's rainy season could wash away her dreams.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Man Cave
programme.desc: Joe Donovan, an avid skier and adventurer, has found the perfect spot for his permanent base camp on a remote ridge in southwest Montana. Follow the adventure as he battles the elements to build his rustic, straw bale, dream cabin.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Miami-Dade County Fair/ Sarasota County Agricultural Fair
programme.desc: Noah Cappe samples one of the craziest carnival eats in America - chicken wing ice cream. Then it's a glazed donut burger with cheese and bacon.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 89er Days/ Puno Strawberry Festival
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe heads to Oklahoma to pig out on a giant Texas tenderloin sandwich. Then, he heads to Virginia for a strawberry pizza.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California Dreamin'
programme.desc: Noah is California dreamin' for the Golden State's best carnival eats. He sets things on fire with a Deep Pit BBQ dinner, gets groovy with the Green Goddess and celebrates with Birthday Cake Crepes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Bigger and Better in Texas
programme.desc: Discover a Forth Worth Tex Mex Burrito almost as big as the state of Texas itself.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Nacho, Nacho Man
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tries some of the wackiest and wildest nacho combinations on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Oak Mountain Spring State Fair/ Apache Rattlesnake Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is crazy about fried bread pudding bites in Alabama. He then gets bitten by a fried rattlesnake in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Flame On!
programme.desc: We're firing up like an inferno and hitting a variety of dishes across the United States that have all the flame in their game! In Santa Monica, California, a burger joint is putting heat to their meat with a sauce made from guava and habanero peppers.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Flavor Fiesta!
programme.desc: From spicy Chilean pork ribs in the Pacific Northwest to a Puerto Rican pork-tacular down in Georgia, diners are finding south-of-the-border flavor without ever leaving the States.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Doing the Island Hop
programme.desc: From St. Thomas to Mackinac Island, Michigan to Montauk, New York, Katie's beach hopping to find the local take on the best treats these islands have to offer. She samples fresh Ahi Tuna nachos, Caribbean stewed chicken and a burger with a unique twist.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Katie travels worldwide to find regionals specialties along the way.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Family Recipes
programme.desc: Katie Lee is hitting the beaches for tried and true family dishes. From Puerto Rican-tinged Soul Food to a Cuban-influenced ice cream shop, Katie learns the origins of some delicious dishes as well as the heart, soul and story behind them.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Twist on a Classic
programme.desc: Chefs show Katie how to bring local flair to fan-favourite dishes like a snapper Reuben on the Florida coast, juicy shrimp in the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Beach Bar Snacks
programme.desc: Beach life brings up visions of tasty food, great cocktails and relaxing fun times, and Katie Lee is getting a taste of the amazing bar bites brewing along the beaches of the world.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Authentic Eats
programme.desc: Katie Lee is finding authentic beach cuisine that stays true to its local origins. She hits up a Georgia beach barbecue and then heads to Mexico for Chile Rellenos.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Flavors of New England
programme.desc: Bobby takes a culinary trip to New England for his latest brunch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bread-Y for Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby shows us how to get creative with bread. His menu features frittata di pane with broccoli rabe, sausage ricotta, and blueberry-lemon bread pudding muffins.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Best of the Pacific Northwest
programme.desc: A Pacific Northwest menu features smoked salmon and scallion scramble.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: New Orleans Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes a culinary walk through New Orleans' French Quarter for this brunch that's perfect anytime of the day.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Tastes of the Tropics
programme.desc: Pastry chef phenom, Ron Ben-Israel, hangs with Michael Symon in Baton Rouge, La. to feast on a mile-high key lime pie and Caribbean-inspired brisket melt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Good Eats: Melondrama
programme.desc: Alton demystifies one of the most complex fruits around: the melon.

programme.title: Good Eats: Sandwich Craft
programme.desc: Join host Alton Brown as he and his nephew Elton dose up a little sandwich-craft.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mac and Cheese and Monster Meat
programme.desc: Noah takes a bite out of the Great New York State Fair where The Defibrillator gets his heart pumping. Then he tries on two local favorites -- the piquant Buffalo chicken mac and cheese and the crispy clamwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie And Sunday Dinner Sundaes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off at the Big E in West Springfield, Mass., where he 'meats up' with a deconstructed Turducken Sandwich and the award-winning country fried shepherd's pie.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dumplings & Pumpkins
programme.desc: Noah's first stop is at the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee, where he feels the burn with dead heat tacos.

programme.title: Victory at Sea

programme.title: Missions That Changed the War: Enola Gay: SuperFortress
