programme.desc: Hilarious pranks are played on unsuspecting people and the results are caught on tape.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackeé Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Margaret Cho, and Howie Mandel.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Parker vs. Amphy
programme.desc: A man has to explain his unexplained absences when his girlfriend’s GPS tracking leads her to believe he must be cheating.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Flying Kick/ You Call This A Teacup Maltipoo
programme.desc: A man is suing over a car accident. A woman says a breeder lied to her and she did not receive the dog she was promised.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: God Now/ Hair-Do Doppelganger
programme.desc: A woman blames a business partner for lost sales after viral video; mistaken identity leads to a damaged wig.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Haggerty vs. Wandick
programme.desc: After receiving a surprise call from Paternity Court, a California man stands before Judge Lauren Lake to find out if he is the biological father of the young woman he raised for 29 years.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Band's Garage Sale Soars/ Broken Bond
programme.desc: Plaintiff sues over property damage; friend seeks reimbursement for bail money.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Sex Debt Collector
programme.desc: Zaee wants to make amends with her friend YaYa but YaYa reveals she hooked up with Zaee's boyfriend Jeremy. Hillary is after money Lawrence owes her for selling her photos online. Mike asks forgiveness from Cassie for hooking up with her roommate Jade.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her aunt claiming they got into a fight and her aunt bit her lip, so she’s suing for her medical treatment, pain and suffering. Her aunt says she does not believe they are biologically related and wants DNA.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Ripping Off A Kid ' and 'Hiding Defects.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segment feature the cases 'Not Being Very Neighborly ', ' Stiffing a Worker ' and ' Keeping It All'.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: This Divorce Party Was on Fire!/ Bleach Towel Tragedy
programme.desc: A burning wedding dress causes damage; a woman claims she received a rash from a towel.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: The plaintiff says he ex-wife purposely left him an unpaid propane bill out of revenge. Then, the plaintiff is suing for $5000 in damages to her car; the defendant says he did get into a car accident but it wasn’t with the plaintiff’s vehicle.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Know Your Sister Stole Your Diamond Ring
programme.desc: Genie was devastated when her diamond ring went missing after she went to her sister Mimi's house. Genie's husband believes Mimi is the culprit.

programme.title: Maury: Double Denial ... I'll Prove Your Twin Is My Baby's Dad
programme.desc: Danny believes Cheyenne was pregnant before they got back together and that he's not her son's father. Jerika and her boyfriend Joshua are determined to prove to Keynan and his twin sister Kendra that's he the father of Jerika's daughter.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Bad Boys Blindsided
programme.desc: Mychael hooked up with a girl named Porchea and now demands an apology from her! Why? Because, Porchea was born a man!

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: Empty Nest Syndrome
programme.desc: Three moms struggle to find their 'new normal' as their kids leave the home. Mel helps them regain control.

programme.title: Movie: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: A Greek girl falls in love with a non-Greek man, which creates havoc amongst her family.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Grandma's Boy
programme.desc: A 35-year-old man named Alex is forced to live with his grandmother after getting thrown out of his former place due to non-payment of rent.

programme.title: Movie: Arizona
programme.desc: A single and struggling realtor mom's life goes off the rails when she witnesses a murder.

programme.title: Movie: LOL
programme.desc: A mom strives to reconnect with her teen daughter after reading her racy journal.

programme.title: Movie: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: In order to get ahead at work, a young advertising executive pretends she's engaged. She must then convince a recent acquaintance to act the part during an important meeting with her boss.

programme.title: Movie: Nine Months
programme.desc: A child psychiatrist panics when his girlfriend announces that she is pregnant.
